name: Bill Weld
subject: re : re: URGENT PETITION RESPONSE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu4v48K9_g0WZ58gE1rZd3i4&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191121_fr&n=1) Hey there — Earlier this week, my team reached out about our fight to debate President Trump. But what they didn’t say was that we can’t keep up the pressure unless our ads stay on the air. **_I’ll be blunt — we need to raise $50,000 by the end of the month to compete in the ongoing ad war_****.** If we want to make President Trump answer to the American people, _we need to meet this goal._ By coming up short, we’ll risk losing the momentum we’ve worked so hard to build in key battleground states. **With President Trump spending MILLIONS online, we may even have to divert critical funds from our grassroots organizing efforts just to stay in the game.** [**We need your help right now. Can you make a contribution of $50, $100, or whatever you can to help us reach our goal and keep generating the momentum we've worked so hard to build?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu4v48K9_g0WZ58gE1rZd3i4&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191121_fr&n=2 "Donate to Bill Weld!") Thanks in advance for your support, Bill | | [DONATE ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu4v48K9_g0WZ58gE1rZd3i4&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191121_fr&n=3)

name: Tina Smith
subject: Amy McGrath
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Democrats can flip Kentucky's Senate seat and end Mitch McConnell's stranglehold on our democracy. But we need your help.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191121-amy?refcode=em191121-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

When a strong candidate is on the ballot, Democrats can win anywhere -- even in the reddest of areas. We saw it happen just this month in Kentucky, where a Democratic governor defeated a Republican incumbent.

**That means Mitch McConnell is vulnerable -- especially with someone like my friend, Amy McGrath, on the ticket.**

Amy is a former Marine fighter pilot running to unseat McConnell because she firmly believes the people of Kentucky deserve new leadership, not someone deep in the pocket of special interests.

Republicans are already running scared because McConnell was outraised by Amy -- _and she's polling within single digits!_

Democrats can flip Kentucky's Senate seat and end McConnell's stranglehold on our democracy once and for all. And Amy is the right person for the job. But she'll need our help.

**So, I'm asking: will you split a contribution between Amy McGrath's campaign for U.S. Senate in Kentucky and mine to make sure Democrats send Mitch McConnell packing in 2020? This is important.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191121-amy?refcode=em191121-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191121-amy?refcode=em191121-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191121-amy?refcode=em191121-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191121-amy?refcode=em191121-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191121-amy?refcode=em191121-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191121-amy?refcode=em191121-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Mitch McConnell has turned the Senate into a place where good ideas go to die -- blocking just about every progressive bill passed in the House this year. His desk is stacked with legislation that has never seen the Senate floor.

He doesn't work for the people of Kentucky. In fact, he doesn't work for anyone who won't cut him a hefty check or fill his campaign coffers with special interest money.

Kentucky deserves better than McConnell's failed leadership. Our country deserves better. And next year, we have a unique opportunity to deliver the change millions of Americans are hungry for.

**Democrats only need to flip four seats to take back the Senate. Let's make sure one of them is Mitch McConnell's. Split a contribution between Amy McGrath's campaign and ours today:**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191121-amy?refcode=em191121-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191121-amy?refcode=em191121-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191121-amy?refcode=em191121-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191121-amy?refcode=em191121-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191121-amy?refcode=em191121-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191121-amy?refcode=em191121-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
We cannot let Mitch McConnell and his dark money network overwhelm us. That's how he will win. But if we step up and make our voices heard, there's nothing they can do to stop us.

That's why your donation matters so much right now. Thank you.

-- Tina

| | Hi Peter,

All eyes will be on Texas during this election. _The Dallas Morning News_ wrote that "the most-watched race in Texas will be the Senate battle," and we're gearing up for a hard fight. But Sen. Cornyn will pour money into beating MJ -- he already has a nearly $11 million war chest heavily funded by special interest donors.

**Donate now to win this Senate seat, and elect MJ to fight for us in a new Senate that works for hard-working Americans.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909a5/7f51f7bc/4bf3fdd1/4ef09861/2422151982/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20191121nd_n__548__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909a5/7f51f7bc/4bf3fdd1/4ef09867/2422151982/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20191121nd_n__548__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909a5/7f51f7bc/4bf3fdd1/4ef09865/2422151982/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20191121nd_n__548__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909a5/7f51f7bc/4bf3fdd1/4ef0985b/2422151982/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20191121nd_n__548__&amount=50")**
******[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909a5/7f51f7bc/4bf3fdd1/4ef09859/2422151982/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20191121nd_n__548__")******
No matter what happens in the presidential election, we know one thing that's absolutely true: we need a new Senate to make any real progress. And the path to a Senate that prioritizes the American people over special interests and corporate PACs runs straight through Texas.

MJ's not taking money from corporate PACs, because she answers to Texans, not the special interests.

So if you believe in a new kind of Senate -- one that serves the people, not the special interests -- we absolutely have to get MJ elected. And that starts with support from folks like you.

**[Pitch in $10 to elect MJ and build a Senate that serves the people, not the special interests.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909a5/7f51f7bc/4bf3fdd1/4ef09858/2422151982/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20191121nd_n__548__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks,

Team MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909a5/7f51f7bc/4bf3fdd1/4ef09858/2422151982/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20191121nd_n__548__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

| Friends, I could not believe what the Democrats had to say last night! These policies that they are toting are masquerading as helping the middle class, when in reality they are a part of a larger socialist agenda. The radical left wants “free” college tuition, “free“ healthcare, and open borders, paid for higher taxes on Tennesseans. These debates seem to highlight more and more how far left each candidate is willing to go. Right now, we need to send a message that the American people don't want these progressive, socialist policies. We want lower taxes, personal freedoms, and to exercise our constitutional rights. Will you chip in $30 now and send me to DC to fight the radical progressives that clearly don't value you hard-earned income, the Constitution, or your personal freedoms. I won't let you down! [DONATE NOW](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhuikil-uunkhiuw-j/) Your donation will ensure that a TRUE conservative outsider wins this race, and goes to Washington to stand with President Trump. We must keep a majority in the Senate to stop the radical leftist agenda! I love this country, and I love Tennessee, and I'm running to serve you in the United States Senate. Kindly, Dr. Manny [Donate now](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhuikil-uunkhiuw-t/) Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
No Images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-butjudy-ahkdjtlkr-p/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-butjudy-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear Peter,This morning, Governor Scott Walker became the latest conservative leader to endorse my candidacy for Congress.I'm honored, and the next name I want to see on board is YOURS, Peter, which you can add right now with as little as $5 in support of our campaign. [Join Fitz and Walker: $5](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-butjudy-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Join Fitz and Walker: $20](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-butjudy-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [Join Fitz and Walker: $100](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-butjudy-ahkdjtlkr-t/) [Join Fitz and Walker: $250](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-butjudy-ahkdjtlkr-i/) Governor Walker and I stood side by side to pass Act 10, Right to Work, a property tax freeze, balanced budgets and policies that led to $13 billion in tax relief, and countless conservative reforms for the people of Wisconsin. We even eliminated an entire tax - the state property tax.Now, I'm running to bring that same track record of principled success to Washington.I'm honored to have Governor Walker's support, along with heavy-hitter Wisconsin conservatives like Tommy Thompson, Rebecca Kleefisch, Kevin Nicholson, Margaret Farrow, Paul Farrow, John Jagler, Barbara Dittrich, Mark Born, and many more.I'll be looking for YOU next.Thanks,Scott FitzgeraldP.S. [Here's the link to add your name and join Scott Walker in supporting my campaign for Congress](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-butjudy-ahkdjtlkr-u/). Thanks again.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: It’s official: Americans are tuning out the Swamp—and the ratings prove it
body:
Tone-deaf would be an accurate way to describe the Washington political class in general, and it certainly applies to Democrats’ latest... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9d7f186b47&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 21, 2019
---
| | |
# **It’s official: Americans are tuning out the Swamp—and the ratings prove it**

**Tone-deaf** would be an accurate way to describe the Washington political class in general, and it certainly applies to Democrats’ latest impeachment attempt.

**For the past two weeks** , they’ve rolled out witness after witness for hours of nationally televised hearings. Each testimony had a few things in common, including that all substituted pure speculation in lieu of any actual evidence. But today’s “finale” had something extra: The witnesses weren’t even _indirectly_ involved in the July 25 phone call with Ukraine. They learned about it the same way you did—from the news.

🎬 [Watch: CNN tries to attack President Trump—and accidentally proves him right.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=44c898be82&e=3ee4985eea)

**In fact,** one of the two “witnesses” _had already left_ her position when the call occurred. She confirmed her last day at the National Security Council was July 19.

**That’s how little respect** House Democrats have for the impeachment process—and for the American public. Their witnesses didn’t witness anything. Yet Democrat leaders are so convinced of their ability to shape the media narrative that they bet it wouldn’t matter. They assumed a 40-hour TV circus would be enough to tip public support their way.

**Here’s their problem** : Viewers quickly figured out there was nothing to see.

**The ratings prove it**. Simply put, they’re stunning. Despite wall-to-wall media coverage and attention, the first televised impeachment hearing last week drew an estimated 13.8 million viewers—nearly 6 million _fewer_ than when former FBI Director James Comey testified before the Senate two years ago. And this is for _impeachment_.

**Even more telling** is what’s happened to viewership as the hearings pressed on. Once it became clear that no real evidence was forthcoming—only more opinions about President Trump from the Swamp—Americans tuned out. Tuesday’s morning session this week averaged 11.4 million viewers. By noon Wednesday, “the local ABC affiliate had ditched impeachment coverage and was airing its regular newscast instead. The Fox station had a daytime talk show,” _The Washington Times_ reported.

**Or think of it this way** : “There are about 330 million Americans. According to the ratings, nearly 320 million of them aren’t watching the House impeachment proceedings.”

**So did we learn anything** from today’s witnesses, despite their lack of firsthand knowledge about President Trump’s phone call with Ukraine? Actually, yes:
* Fiona Hill previously testified that President Trump’s concerns about corruption in Ukraine were well-known and shared by everyone. “He’s not alone, because everyone has expressed great concerns about corruption in Ukraine,” she said.

* She also warned about the “perceptions of conflicts of interest and ethics” associated with Hunter Biden’s position on the Burisma board.

* David Holmes acknowledged that Democrats’ political efforts in foreign countries have been inappropriate. After not disputing a question that “Democrats and the Clinton campaign were the source of funds that funded the Steele Dossier,” Holmes was asked whether it is appropriate for political parties to run operatives in foreign countries to dig up dirt on their opponents. “No,” he said.

**Meanwhile** , the only real thing Democrats have accomplished this month is effectively shutting down Congress. Just today, Speaker Nancy Pelosi shrugged off her party’s chances of approving USMCA, President Trump’s recent trade deal to improve NAFTA for American workers, any time in the foreseeable future.

**Why is that?** As [_Politico_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8833fa137e&e=3ee4985eea) writes, “she doubts Congress has enough time left to pass the USMCA this year.”

[NEW POLL: Support for Impeachment Declines](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6170c9ab83&e=3ee4985eea)

**Sorry, Swamp:** [Ratings fall flat as most Americans tune out impeachment spectacle](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=17cb43a372&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm running for president because I believe in us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
Friend,
Before you wind down for the night, I want to talk openly with you about why I got into this race in the first place.
I know there are a lot of candidates vying for your support right now, and honestly, we agree on most things.
But I'm not running _only_ because I stand with my colleagues on believing that health care should be a right, or just because I'm with them on understanding the urgent need to meet the existential crisis of climate change, or solely because we're together on knowing that a system of mass incarceration in a country that professes freedom is objectively wrong.
I'm not running just to beat one man in one office -- because we don't win races simply by talking about what we're against. We win when we talk about what we're for, who we're for, and how we fight.
**I 'm running for president of the United States because I believe in us. I believe that this race isn't about left or right -- it's about right or wrong. [I hope you can believe with me.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191121_CB_20191121-fr-CB-beforebed-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
This is a moral moment in America that will define who we want to be as a nation. And in this moment, we must have a revival of civic grace, a more courageous empathy, and a deeper love for each other.
When I talk about love, I'm not talking simply about sentimentality. I'm talking about standing, marching, and fighting alongside each other for a better America -- fighting for each other's children and futures, fighting for folks who don't pray like you or look like you or live like you -- that's what love is.
**And that 's why I'm running for president, team -- that's been my message this whole time.**
**[If you think that's a message that deserves to be in this race, then I need you right now. Please make a donation to our campaign to help ensure that we get a chance to be heard on the next debate stage.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191121_CB_20191121-fr-CB-beforebed-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Thank you. Together, we will rise.
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191121_CB_20191121-fr-CB-beforebed-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
| Paid for by Cory 2020

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1e/5fca0d19/7923ea4e/291c5b59/9476675/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1e/5fca0d19/7923ea4e/291c5b58/9476675/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1e/5fca0d19/7923ea4e/291c5ba7/9476675/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1e/5fca0d19/7923ea4e/291c5ba6/9476675/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1e/5fca0d19/7923ea4e/291c5b5a/9476675/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe "". Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info "".

name: Christina Finello
subject: Peter, I’m asking you personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress |
body:
Peter, thank you SO much to everyone who pitched in after I wrote yesterday \-- I was feeling stressed about finishing the month strong, but I know we can do this! (Apologies for how much I’ve been writing. We’re a small but mighty campaign here in PA-01 -- and we’re doing what it takes to win.) Our systems can be slow to update sometimes, but I don’t think I saw a donation from you come in yet. If I missed it, please just consider my emails as updates!

Our campaign is powered by individuals who believe that our government and its systems should work for the people, not corporations and the wealthy few. That’s why you are an integral part of our campaign and I am beyond grateful for your support. Democrats can WIN in PA-01 -- Hillary Clinton, Gov. Wolf, Sen. Casey, and DOZENS of municipal races have made our district bluer over the past few years, but I won’t be able to do the same in 2020 without you.

Right now, we’re only $1,640 behind our November goal, and with 15 hours until our midnight fundraising benchmark, your support is crucial.

I’m asking you to help us close the gap by donating any amount you can right now. Here’s the link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finelloforcongress**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12111776/124202829/2063951955?refcode=CFN20191122a&refcode2=tj7nam83sqSkJ5x29rVT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzQ2NjY3MC0zMDBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WyDk1B5SYR5NQcA1xO7vDNfjfnMA3rdy8O5V7Vfsne0=)

Thank you!!

Christina

---
**I have something DeVos doesn’t - classroom experience.** For the past 6 years I have walked into a classroom every single day to learn and grow alongside my students. Public schools are where our children go to socialize, grow, learn, thrive, and build important relationships.
****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12113936/124222947/-534763550?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDQzMjZkMi0zODBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yvq_HksHqe5_ANBmn-VJM2f7VkAzVMd_7EtRHB07KJs=&emci=0f697809-410a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ad4326d2-380d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)****

**Secretary of Education is a role for someone who wants our children to succeed.** Betsy DeVos doesn’t. [**_We need 500 signatures on our petition before the end of the day today. body:
MUST-WATCH: I'm telling it like it is... and the radical left hates it. Tap or click to see new ad >>

| | | Peter, We've all seen how the radical left has embraced Colin Kaepernick. They LOVE that he kneels for the national anthem... and he loves to play the victim.

Well, I'll tell you this. **I think it 's a DISGRACE.**

It's the people who've fought and died for our country that make it possible for him to play football. He should play, if he can... but he should stand for the national anthem.

_Believe me, kneeling for the anthem WOULD NOT happen on any team I coach!_

Today, we're launching a new ad. **[Watch it here, and chip in $5, $10, $25, or $50 today to help us get it in front of Alabama voters!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=5b25520b0e9f03b5356799790ee762e76b384a7a66c5c568ae333704a7bbb95de471b0afd6483a10e36ca33a681bec3d729622168258a39a "Watch it here, and chip in $5, $10, $25, or $50 today to help us get it in front of Alabama voters!")**

The way I was raised, before a football game you stood to honor America. And after the game, you knelt to honor God.

**Only in today 's world of "political correctness" gone mad is this considered controversial.**

Enough is enough. I'm fighting to defend our values, and to STOP the radical left's push for socialism, open borders, and abortion-on-demand. I'm running to help President Donald J. Trump SAVE our country.

**[Check out my new ad, and rush a special contribution to help share my message](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=5b25520b0e9f03b54f8529d58dc0f140712456f7e7a942305f2f45f57f4cf7209895fde037b052ecb50ccca8308de198b2fdc94693b4ef9f "Check out my new ad, and rush a special contribution to help share my message")**.

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: My Op-ed in Indian Country Today: "We need to do more for Native Americans – especially Native American women"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
**I know I have not done enough: as ****I write in my op-ed in Indian Country Today (link below),**** we must restructure the U.S. government's policies towards Native Americans Native Americans and their tribal sovereignty to make it accountable.**
Native American people serve in the military at a higher rate than any other ethnic group. During World War II, some tribes saw 70% of their able-bodied men enlisted. **During my time in service in the United States Navy, I served with many Native Americans who always distinguished themselves and did their community and our entire country proud. **As a former Navy Admiral, **I believe we need to be accountable to Native American citizens of these United States – not only for the debt we owe them for their service today, but for the injustices throughout our nation’s history that we are still struggling to mend.**
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12115438/124236728/1036341175?refcode=em112219native&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGMxMDgwMy0zZDBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YnQqYGGbhesNHz7xxH6E_8Dcl88MhtUKIfAzqepqseQ=)
During my career, I traveled to over 80 countries. I saw many marginalized communities. In places like Africa, I encountered traumatized peoples, fragmented and weakened by generations of colonialism, by a foreign system being inflicted upon them. They lost their sense of community, their sense of identity, their ability to pass down their own governance practices, how to relate to one another, even their language. Americans need to recognize that we did the same thing here, to Native American communities. Above all, **we need to understand that today's poverty, ill health, addiction and substance abuse, depression, alienation, and suicide, are all the tragic result of what we inflicted on Native American communities. **
Yet I've also seen countries that struggled in the post-colonial era become shining examples of strength and independence. And now the same must happen in Indian Country (and, indeed, it is happening already, driven largely by Native American people themselves). That is why in **healing past wrongs we must start with the increased funding that is necessary for tribal education, especially language revitalization and immersion programs, as one important way tribes can take back what was stolen from them. **
This work will require doing much better at respecting tribal sovereignty. Tribes are sovereign nations and our treaties with Native American tribes are treaties between equals. However, when I walk off a United States ship into another sovereign nation overseas — Nigeria, United Arab Emirates, or wherever — I am subject to their laws and judicial system. Often, there will be what we call a "status of forces” agreement that ensures fairness for our military members when charged with a crime — but both nations have to agree to that — while they are subject to the other nation’s jurisdiction. Why isn't it the same when I walk into Pine Ridge Reservation? I should be subject to its sovereignty — its rules and jurisdiction should pertain to me when I am within its borders. Without that, there can be no accountability for justice, because a non-Native American can walk onto a reservation, commit a crime, and escape justice due to jurisdictional issues. **More than 80% of sex crimes on reservations are committed by non-native men. **
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12115439/124236729/1036341175?refcode=em112219native&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGMxMDgwMy0zZDBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YnQqYGGbhesNHz7xxH6E_8Dcl88MhtUKIfAzqepqseQ=)
**This issue of accountability extends into the unacceptable failure to even know how many tribal women and girls are missing each year. One estimate from 2016 calculated over 5000 reports of missing women and girls, yet not even the federal government knows how many are missing. **We need to get the data on missing Native American girls and women, then we can — and must — also focus resources where we need them: police, prosecutors, judges. We need to fully fund tribal justice programs, including restorative justice programs, because local tax revenue is simply not enough.
It is with all this sordid history in mind that **we must consider other issues from our history and correct certain wrongs. **That is why I support rescinding the 20 Medals of Honor awarded to U.S. soldiers who participated in the massacre of some 300 Lakota people at Wounded Knee. I believe as a military man with 31 years of service, leaving them on the record diminishes all of the other Medals of Honor given to thousands of brave patriots throughout our history. There is nothing honorable about killing women and children. **We cannot change history, but we can change the way we look at it, and the way we teach it to our children. **It's time to right this historical wrong.
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12115440/124236730/1036341175?refcode=em112219native&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGMxMDgwMy0zZDBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YnQqYGGbhesNHz7xxH6E_8Dcl88MhtUKIfAzqepqseQ=)
And **it's not too late to right historical wrongs that are being committed still today.** From the Keystone XL and Dakota Access pipelines, to Bears Ears National Monument and Chaco Canyon, it's not too late to stop the encroachment of corporate profiteers on Native lands, resources, and holy sites. We must learn to honor and respect Native American holy sites as we do churches, synagogues, and mosques. **As President, I will always stand with Native people against the forces that aim to exploit and destroy what is theirs. **
**We need to fulfill ALL of our treaty obligations to Native people, **and that includes fully funding the Indian Health Service, major increases to education and labor training (including through my “training for a lifetime” program) — and, of course, infrastructure, including roads, bridges, dams, and housing. Some 40% of homes in Native American communities are considered sub-standard. 16% have no indoor plumbing. We must do better — and as President, I will.
Finally, there will always be consultation between myself, my cabinet, and Indigenous communities. I plan to re-institute the annual Tribal Nations Summit at the White House, because I can only be accountable to you if you have a seat at the table. Native Americans – and all Americans – will always be welcome in a Joe Sestak White House.
[**Please contribute to ensure I can deliver as President for all Americans, including Native Americans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12115441/124236731/723115086?refcode=em112219native&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGMxMDgwMy0zZDBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YnQqYGGbhesNHz7xxH6E_8Dcl88MhtUKIfAzqepqseQ=)
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12115442/124236732/1036341175?refcode=em112219native&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGMxMDgwMy0zZDBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YnQqYGGbhesNHz7xxH6E_8Dcl88MhtUKIfAzqepqseQ=)
Warmest regards, Joe
**Link to article: [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12115443/124236733/1624152011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGMxMDgwMy0zZDBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YnQqYGGbhesNHz7xxH6E_8Dcl88MhtUKIfAzqepqseQ=&emci=770ef503-d10c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=e0c10803-3d0d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)**
Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12115444/124236734/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGMxMDgwMy0zZDBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YnQqYGGbhesNHz7xxH6E_8Dcl88MhtUKIfAzqepqseQ=&emci=770ef503-d10c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=e0c10803-3d0d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798) and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times.

clean_body: Peter, I know I have not done enough: as I write in my op-ed in Indian Country Today (link below), we must restructure the U.S. government's policies towards Native Americans Native Americans and their tribal sovereignty to make it accountable. Native American people serve in the military at a higher rate than any other ethnic group. During World War II, some tribes saw 70% of their able-bodied men enlisted. During my time in service in the United States Navy, I served with many Native Americans who always distinguished themselves and did their community and our entire country proud. As a former Navy Admiral, I believe we need to be accountable to Native American citizens of these United States – not only for the debt we owe them for their service today, but for the injustices throughout our nation’s history that we are still struggling to mend. = During my career, I traveled to over 80 countries. I saw many marginalized communities. In places like Africa, I encountered traumatized peoples, fragmented and weakened by generations of colonialism, by a foreign system being inflicted upon them. They lost their sense of community, their sense of identity, their ability to pass down their own governance practices, how to relate to one another, even their language. Americans need to recognize that we did the same thing here, to Native American communities. Above all, we need to understand that today's poverty, ill health, addiction and substance abuse, depression, alienation, and suicide, are all the tragic result of what we inflicted on Native American communities. Yet I've also seen countries that struggled in the post-colonial era become shining examples of strength and independence. And now the same must happen in Indian Country (and, indeed, it is happening already, driven largely by Native American people themselves). That is why in healing past wrongs we must start with the increased funding that is necessary for tribal education, especially language revitalization and immersion programs, as one important way tribes can take back what was stolen from them. This work will require doing much better at respecting tribal sovereignty. Tribes are sovereign nations and our treaties with Native American tribes are treaties between equals. However, when I walk off a United States ship into another sovereign nation overseas — Nigeria, United Arab Emirates, or wherever — I am subject to their laws and judicial system. Often, there will be what we call a "status of forces” agreement that ensures fairness for our military members when charged with a crime — but both nations have to agree to that — while they are subject to the other nation’s jurisdiction. Why isn't it the same when I walk into Pine Ridge Reservation? I should be subject to its sovereignty — its rules and jurisdiction should pertain to me when I am within its borders. Without that, there can be no accountability for justice, because a non-Native American can walk onto a reservation, commit a crime, and escape justice due to jurisdictional issues. More than 80% of sex crimes on reservations are committed by non-native men. = This issue of accountability extends into the unacceptable failure to even know how many tribal women and girls are missing each year. One estimate from 2016 calculated over 5000 reports of missing women and girls, yet not even the federal government knows how many are missing. We need to get the data on missing Native American girls and women, then we can — and must — also focus resources where we need them: police, prosecutors, judges. We need to fully fund tribal justice programs, including restorative justice programs, because local tax revenue is simply not enough. It is with all this sordid history in mind that we must consider other issues from our history and correct certain wrongs. That is why I support rescinding the 20 Medals of Honor awarded to U.S. soldiers who participated in the massacre of some 300 Lakota people at Wounded Knee. I believe as a military man with 31 years of service, leaving them on the record diminishes all of the other Medals of Honor given to thousands of brave patriots throughout our history. There is nothing honorable about killing women and children. We cannot change history, but we can change the way we look at it, and the way we teach it to our children. It's time to right this historical wrong. = And it's not too late to right historical wrongs that are being committed still today. From the Keystone XL and Dakota Access pipelines, to Bears Ears National Monument and Chaco Canyon, it's not too late to stop the encroachment of corporate profiteers on Native lands, resources, and holy sites. We must learn to honor and respect Native American holy sites as we do churches, synagogues, and mosques. As President, I will always stand with Native people against the forces that aim to exploit and destroy what is theirs. We need to fulfill ALL of our treaty obligations to Native people, and that includes fully funding the Indian Health Service, major increases to education and labor training (including through my “training for a lifetime” program) — and, of course, infrastructure, including roads, bridges, dams, and housing. Some 40% of homes in Native American communities are considered sub-standard. 16% have no indoor plumbing. We must do better — and as President, I will. Finally, there will always be consultation between myself, my cabinet, and Indigenous communities. I plan to re-institute the annual Tribal Nations Summit at the White House, because I can only be accountable to you if you have a seat at the table. Native Americans – and all Americans – will always be welcome in a Joe Sestak White House. = = Warmest regards, Joe Link to article: Come on board. We encourage you to and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times. Paid for by Joe Sestak for President Joe Sestak for President P.O Box 17246 Alexandria, VA 22302 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: Jason Lewis
subject: Hitting the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
We’ve got a whole lot of ground to cover as we work to reach voters across Minnesota... and as a fiscal conservative, I’ve been eager to find a low-cost way to do so.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/cd1bc8d9c3e47ed3/79709e1bbb4a72fec3d6b838967d376c/33183) Fellow Conservative, We’ve got a whole lot of ground to cover as we work to reach voters across Minnesota... and as a fiscal conservative, I’ve been eager to find a low-cost way to do so. **We crunched the numbers, and just picked up a used Fleetwood Tioga RV!** It’s a great vehicle, and the price was right. But it needs a little detailing and the engine needs a tune-up... and we need help from top supporters like you. **[Will you help us get ready to hit the road, by chipping in $10, $25, $50, or $100 to fix up the Team Lewis RV?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/cd1bc8d9c3e47ed3/ed7d264fc1dc045ac3d6b838967d376c/33183)** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/cd1bc8d9c3e47ed3/dad125e7288a389bc3d6b838967d376c/33183) **[Chip in at least $25 dollars today, and we'll save you a VIP spot at the ribbon cutting/unveiling, and you'll get to sign your name on the side!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/cd1bc8d9c3e47ed3/bd4f2e89398c1cf0c3d6b838967d376c/33183)**

**[Chip in at least $50 dollars today, and you'll have the opportunity for a photo with Jason too!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/cd1bc8d9c3e47ed3/32fa2129179e918bc3d6b838967d376c/33183)**
We’re going to be visiting 87 counties across the Land of 10,000 Lakes multiple times over the next year, and so it's important that the Team Lewis RV is ready for the big miles we’re going to rack up! Help us get around Minnesota to connect with voters, share my message, and rally conservatives for the challenge ahead of us. **Together, I know we can defeat ultra-liberal Tina Smith and TAKE BACK Minnesota!** \- Jason

name: Mark
subject: Derek, where do you stand?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Virginia is poised to make history, and I want to know where you stand. Will you sign my petition and show your support to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment and guarantee women's equality in the U.S.
|
---
| | Derek,

Virginia's elections this month were a historic moment for our Commonwealth. Our new Democratic General Assembly members are heading to Richmond with a clear agenda to move Virginia forward, and one of the most important items on that agenda is finally ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment.

This long-overdue constitutional amendment will guarantee equality under the law by clearly outlawing discrimination on the basis of sex.**I'm so proud that two of the very first bills to be introduced in both houses of the General Assembly this week are resolutions making Virginia the 38th state to ratify the ERA.** In the U.S. Senate this week, Tim Kaine and I sponsored a resolution that will make sure this guarantee of women's equality is expressly recognized in our Constitution.

**[Virginia is poised to make history, and I want to know where you stand. Will you sign my petition and show your support to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment and guarantee women's equality in the U.S. Constitution?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d786/53d9897e/53c4deb0/1c89e67d/4268185481/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-era")** | **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d786/53d9897e/53c4deb0/1c89e67d/4268185481/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-era")**
---
After decades of brave activism by women across the country, we are on the verge of getting the support of the 38 states necessary to amend the Constitution. I'm proud to stand with the women in the General Assembly who are leading this charge, and I pledge to support their efforts in the Senate however I can.

**[As the General Assembly prepares to consider this important legislation, I hope you'll sign to show your support for the Equal Rights Amendment.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d786/53d9897e/53c4deb0/1c89e67d/4268185481/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-era")**

Sincerely,
Mark

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d786/53d9897e/53c4deb0/1c89e67c/4268185481/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM1NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191122db__356__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

body:
| | | | | Peter,

Dan introduced legislation that will control the price of life-saving medications, and he wants to know if you support it!

**[Sign our petition now if you support Dan’s mission to control the costs of life-saving prescription medications.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12124422/124308266/-1947902275?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzRkYjU1Ni01OTBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VVQhKlatdt8Jujr0a14JCwQybuiazSRPWsgMYgE-BaY=&emci=7b4db556-590d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=7c4db556-590d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)**

**_Begin forwarded message from Dan Lipinski:_**

Peter,

As you may know, I have been an insulin-dependent diabetic for 30 years. **I am very familiar with how much the prices of life-sustaining medication have skyrocketed over the years.**

That is why I introduced legislation that will control the costs of life-saving medications like chemotherapy drugs, anti-seizure medications, and insulin.

I know that this bill will save people’s lives – that’s why I’m set on getting this legislation passed. But I need to know if my supporters stand with me. **[Sign on to stand with me in support of controlling the costs of life-saving prescription medications!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12124423/124308267/-1947902275?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzRkYjU1Ni01OTBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VVQhKlatdt8Jujr0a14JCwQybuiazSRPWsgMYgE-BaY=&emci=7b4db556-590d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=7c4db556-590d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)**
****[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12124424/124308268/-1947902275?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzRkYjU1Ni01OTBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VVQhKlatdt8Jujr0a14JCwQybuiazSRPWsgMYgE-BaY=&emci=7b4db556-590d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=7c4db556-590d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)****
I’ve met with countless citizens who are devastated by the exorbitant costs of life-saving medications.

Bottom Line: **Drug companies should not be able to price-gouge hard-working people.**

**If you agree, then sign on to support this legislation to control the costs of life-saving prescription medications:**

**[https://secure.ngpvan.com/4Ez_HhwRYEmfpDXFpFEAsA2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12124425/124308269/-1947902275?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzRkYjU1Ni01OTBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VVQhKlatdt8Jujr0a14JCwQybuiazSRPWsgMYgE-BaY=&emci=7b4db556-590d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=7c4db556-590d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)**

Thank you for standing with me on this personal issue,

Dan Lipinski

| |
---

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, Dan introduced legislation that will control the price of life-saving medications, and he wants to know if you support it! Begin forwarded message from Dan Lipinski: Peter, As you may know, I have been an insulin-dependent diabetic for 30 years. I am very familiar with how much the prices of life-sustaining medication have skyrocketed over the years. That is why I introduced legislation that will control the costs of life-saving medications like chemotherapy drugs, anti-seizure medications, and insulin. I know that this bill will save people’s lives – that’s why I’m set on getting this legislation passed. But I need to know if my supporters stand with me. ** I’ve met with countless citizens who are devastated by the exorbitant costs of life-saving medications. Bottom Line: Drug companies should not be able to price-gouge hard-working people. If you agree, then sign on to support this legislation to control the costs of life-saving prescription medications: Thank you for standing with me on this personal issue, Dan Lipinski | | Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Sign my petition: Protect Iowa’s Farmers and our Planet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

In another corrupt move by the Trump Administration, the Environmental Protection Agency is continuing to put big oil profits ahead of the livelihoods of Iowa’s farmers.

**[Sign the petition demanding the EPA to uphold the law. We can’t let our farmers and our planet take a back seat to big oil profits.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12124868/124311596/1890483537?mscode=em19_191122_renewableenergypt&refcode=em19_191122_renewableenergypt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQxMGUwYy01YjBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8eA1YjlqbXX76dgcbAmlGwzqKV06o3zZAPi_CAK5TM=&emci=181c6fc3-f906-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=24d10e0c-5b0d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12124869/124311597/1890483537?mscode=em19_191122_renewableenergypt&refcode=em19_191122_renewableenergypt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQxMGUwYy01YjBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8eA1YjlqbXX76dgcbAmlGwzqKV06o3zZAPi_CAK5TM=&emci=181c6fc3-f906-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=24d10e0c-5b0d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)
I’m proud to say that our district, Iowa’s 4th, leads the nation in renewable fuel production, and that here in Iowa, we have 42 ethanol plants.

Renewable fuels must be a part of the transition to a green economy. Scientists have proven that carbon pollution has dangerous effects, and Iowa can -- and must -- lead the charge by supplying our country with a safer alternative.

However, instead of upholding the Renewable Fuel Standard, a law written and passed by Congress, the EPA has padded the bottom lines of big oil companies like Exxon and Chevron. This law has been the most successful clean fuels policy in American history, helping to create rural jobs, reduce oil imports, and protect our environment -- but the EPA is rendering it useless.

They’ve handed out waivers like candy to these big oil companies, allowing them to skirt the law and not blend ethanol into their gasoline.

As a result of these waivers, corn prices in August dropped 10% -- a record low. Ethanol plants have closed or idled. Many have been laid off.

The EPA’s actions are insulting to the millions of farmers working hard to provide for their families, our communities, and our planet.

It also sets back our efforts to reduce carbon outputs. If the EPA continues to provide waivers to oil refineries, they have no incentive to work towards fuel alternatives.

**[If you agree that the EPA must stand by our farmers and the renewable fuels industry, sign the petition.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12124870/124311598/1890483537?mscode=em19_191122_renewableenergypt&refcode=em19_191122_renewableenergypt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQxMGUwYy01YjBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8eA1YjlqbXX76dgcbAmlGwzqKV06o3zZAPi_CAK5TM=&emci=181c6fc3-f906-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=24d10e0c-5b0d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12124871/124311599/1890483537?mscode=em19_191122_renewableenergypt&refcode=em19_191122_renewableenergypt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQxMGUwYy01YjBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8eA1YjlqbXX76dgcbAmlGwzqKV06o3zZAPi_CAK5TM=&emci=181c6fc3-f906-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=24d10e0c-5b0d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)
Thanks for making your voice heard, Peter.

Standing Tall for All,

\-- J.D. Scholten

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12124872/124311600/-1319866263?refcode=em19_191122_renewableenergypt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQxMGUwYy01YjBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8eA1YjlqbXX76dgcbAmlGwzqKV06o3zZAPi_CAK5TM=)

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Have questions, concerns, or ideas? Simply reply to this email — we love hearing from supporters! You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12124873/124311601/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQxMGUwYy01YjBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8eA1YjlqbXX76dgcbAmlGwzqKV06o3zZAPi_CAK5TM=&emci=181c6fc3-f906-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=24d10e0c-5b0d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12124874/124311602/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQxMGUwYy01YjBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8eA1YjlqbXX76dgcbAmlGwzqKV06o3zZAPi_CAK5TM=&emci=181c6fc3-f906-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=24d10e0c-5b0d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013). | Dear Derek, **Democrats and their friends in the national media simply can't hide their disdain for President Trump.**
Earlier this week, a UN Report was issued detailing the detention of more than 100,000 minor immigrant children in U.S. detention facilities. The report said it was the **highest level ever** and attributed it to the Trump Administration, while Democrats and their allies in the media pounced to place blame on President Trump. Less than 24 hours later the UN researcher determined the detentions did not occur under the Trump administration, but rather under the Obama Administration. Everyone removed their tweets and stories without apologizing to President Trump for their ridiculous statements.

name: Betsy
subject: Why is Jim Jordan in Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader |
clean_body: It's hard to watch. As a person born and raised in the great state of Ohio, it's embarrassing to see Jim Jordan as the representative for Ohio during the impeachment proceedings. How did it come to this? How was he elected? How is he STILL in office? Gerrymandering. And it's why I'm taking my experience and my momentum from my 2018 congressional race to run for the Ohio State Senate. Until we elect people to the state legislature who will re-draw the districts fairly, we will see people like Jim Jordan in Congress. The 2020 election is critical for making Ohio a true swing state again. In 2021, after the census, new Ohio laws give the legislature the opportunity to re-draw our districts and get rid of gerrymandering. Every seat we can flip in the state legislature next year will give us more of a say in how our congressional and state districts are drawn for the next ten years. We can create a fair district for Jim Jordan instead of his current crazy duck-shaped district that meanders the state. But we can't fight fairly without grassroots support. Fair elections in Ohio are important not just to the future of Ohio but to the future of our country. I hope you can chip in to get Ohio on the right track. | Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader | Friends of Betsy Rader PO Box 280 Novelty OH 44072 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please = p.p1 {margin: 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px; font: 12.0px 'Helvetica Neue'; -webkit-text-stroke: #000000} p.p2 {margin: 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px; font: 12.0px 'Helvetica Neue'; -webkit-text-stroke: #000000; min-height: 14.0px} p.p3 {margin: 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px; font: 12.0px Verdana; -webkit-text-stroke: #000000} span.s1 {font-kerning: none} span.s2 {text-decoration: underline ; font-kerning: none} p.p1 {margin: 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px; font: 12.0px 'Helvetica Neue'; -webkit-text-stroke: #000000} p.p2 {margin: 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px; font: 12.0px 'Helvetica Neue'; -webkit-text-stroke: #000000; min-height: 14.0px} p.p3 {margin: 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px; font: 12.0px Verdana; -webkit-text-stroke: #000000} span.s1 {font-kerning: none} span.s2 {text-decoration: underline ; font-kerning: none}

name: My Faith Votes
subject: SCOTUS Watch
body:
| | Critical updates from the current session of the Supreme Court
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MhVFq7chfUSHM6K5eXtXchA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191122com01&n=1)
| While Americans across the nation gear up for the holiday season with Thanksgiving and Christmas just around the corner, the Supreme Court has had a busy November hearing ten important cases. The cases relate to issues involving immigration, the environment, and the Fourth Amendment just to name a few. **Here are three cases this month that are worth noting:**
1. Department of Homeland Security v. Regents of the University of California
2. Kansas v. Glover
3. County of Maui, Hawaii v. Hawaii Wildlife Fund

#### Department of Homeland Security v. Regents of the University of California
The Supreme Court heard arguments in three consolidated cases earlier this month (Department of Homeland Security v. Regents of the University of California, Trump v. NAACP, and McAleenan v. Vidal). All three cases were related to the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals program (also referred to as DACA). The Obama administration created the DACA program to allow illegal aliens who came to the United States as children and who were under the age of 30-years-old to apply for work authorization and deferral of deportation to stay in the United States. Later, the Obama administration removed the age limit and established the Deferred Action for Parents of Americans (DAPA). This new program grants status for parents of U.S. citizens who came to the U.S. illegally. Both DAPA and DACA programs were challenged by 26 states that argued the programs violated the Administrative Procedure Act (APA), which requires agency rules to go through public notice and comment, and it violated U.S. immigration laws. The case was heard by the 5th Circuit U.S. Court of Appeals, which ruled in favor of the states. In 2016, the case was heard by the Supreme Court but a conclusive ruling was not reached because Justice Scalia passed away while the case was pending and the eight-member bench was deadlocked. The Department of Homeland Security and President Trump’s administration began rolling back the DACA program deeming it unlawful causing several more liberal states (such as New York, Washington D.C. and California) to then challenge the Trump administration in court. The Trump administration maintains that it has the authority to reverse a program it views to be unlawful and since the Administrative Procedure Act prohibits judicial review of agency enforcement decisions, the courts may not review this decision. However, several states challenging the rollback argue this deprives recipients (DACA and DAPA) of due process. **The central question in this case:** [Is it judicially reviewable and lawful for the Department of Homeland Security to rollback the DACA and DAPA programs](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hMVcTktAj198jVo5TgG12F_f-vI69J0Zy-CKWnrOX9trbVdJdPreGm662l39IgYI7eraFspJI9ndffJRbfWr5Aoj-6giwRFtRzWiNdzlrxUP0PPILhnsTpnfLbo7Qvc87Q&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191122com01&n=2)? Oral arguments for these three consolidated cases were heard on November 12, 2019.
#### Kansas v. Glover
Sheriff Deputy, Mark Mehrer in Douglas County, Kansas pulled over Charles Glover Jr. after running the license plate of his pickup truck and discovering that Glover’s license had been revoked. Glover was charged with driving as a habitual violator. Glover, however, filed a motion to suppress the evidence from the traffic stop and argued that Sheriff Deputy Mehrer violated his Fourth Amendment rights because he lacked sufficient evidence to conduct the traffic stop. The state court agreed with Glover and ruled in his favor. The Kansas Court of Appeals reversed the district court’s ruling causing the case to reach the Kansas Supreme Court which ruled that the Sheriff Deputy Mehrer’s suspicion alone did not establish reasonable enough suspicion to conduct the traffic stop. The case is now before the Supreme Court where the state of Kansas argues that the state requires more than reasonable suspicion to conduct a traffic stop. **The central question in this case:** [Under the Fourth Amendment, is it reasonable for an officer to suspect that the registered owner of a vehicle is the same individual driving the vehicle without any additional information or evidence to the contrary](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hGDRKxyQO2epvwyJ8LAG5YMmqilTM659woS-wNKAfFNW&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191122com01&n=3)? Oral arguments for this case were heard on November 4, 2019.
#### County of Maui, Hawaii v. Hawaii Wildlife Fund
Maui County in Hawaii has four wells that act as the primary means of liquid waste disposal for the county. The Lahaina Wastewater Reclamation Facility treats wastewater every day and then injects it into the underground wells. In 2013 the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) found that 90 percent of this wastewater put underground ends up in the Pacific Ocean. The Clean Water Act requires an exemption from the National Pollutant Discharge Elimination System if there is a discharge of pollutants from a point source. Environmental groups sued Maui in 2012 claiming the wastewater facility wells were damaging marine life and a reef. However, Maui County argued that it is not required to obtain a federal permit for pollution that travels through groundwater. The EPA actually released a new interpretation of the Clean Water Act that supported the arguments Maui County’s arguments. The case was heard by the 9th Circuit Court which ruled in favor of the environmentalists. **The central question in this case:** [Does the Clean Water Act require a permit to be obtained if pollutants from a point source are conveyed to navigate waters by a nonpoint source such as groundwater](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hPs0nRGsBXRrH9VTs0k1FkqODZMfU0aFKb3FNMATMI4ygRKXoHBokBn_aPBGMdan62HgeLgBKS0hit-AXsFh_Sg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191122com01&n=4)? Oral arguments for this case were heard on November 6, 2019. Please continue to pray faithfully every month for our nine Supreme Court Justices to seek the Lord for His wisdom as they rule on these important cases. | | _“Evil men do not understand justice, but those who seek the Lord understand it completely.”_ Proverbs 28:5
---|---
**United. We Stand.**
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191122com01&n=5)
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191122com01&n=6).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191122com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191122com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191122com01&n=9)

name: Yang2020
subject: Take the Pledge for Humanity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We’re putting our Humanity First campaign for America into action.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3372%2E377263%2E8pv4Xs) Yang Gang --

This is the Humanity First campaign. We talk a lot about what that means, and as a result, we hear uplifting stories every day about the kindness spread by the Yang Gang.

That’s why we’re launching our Pledge for Humanity.

**[We’re putting our Humanity First campaign for America into action. From 11/27 to 12/3 we’re calling on you, Yang Gang, to pledge one hour of your time to do something positive for humanity.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-humanity-pledge-20191122?source=email-20191122am-a&t=6&akid=3372%2E377263%2E8pv4Xs)** | [Take the Pledge](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-humanity-pledge-20191122?source=email-20191122am-a&t=9&akid=3372%2E377263%2E8pv4Xs)
---
We’re going to put a counter on our website to tally the hours pledged. It will show everyone watching that this isn’t just a campaign, this is a movement that stands for Humanity First values. Everyone will see that this movement can show up to make big changes.

Giving an hour of your time is easy. You can volunteer at a soup kitchen, help clean up a park, write letters to active service members, or volunteer at a shelter.

The options and opportunities are endless for us to show how human our movement truly is.

**[So Yang Gang, will you give one hour of your time in our Pledge for Humanity? Take the pledge and let’s take one hour each to make a lasting, positive impact across the country.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-humanity-pledge-20191122?source=email-20191122am-a&t=8&akid=3372%2E377263%2E8pv4Xs)**
[Take the Pledge](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-humanity-pledge-20191122?source=email-20191122am-a&t=7&akid=3372%2E377263%2E8pv4Xs)
---
Whatever you decide to do to give back, make sure to wear your Yang gear while doing it and to use the hashtag #pledgeforhumanity on social media to spread the word on what this Humanity First movement is all about. And bring a few friends!

Thank you for putting Humanity First,

Yang2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17478?t=2&akid=3372%2E377263%2E8pv4Xs)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=3372%2E377263%2E8pv4Xs) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=3372%2E377263%2E8pv4Xs) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Booker HQ
subject: So it's the 22nd of the month...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey there, On the 22nd of almost every month, we've asked you to **[chip in $22 (or whatever you can) to our campaign, because that's our average online contribution.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191122_BHQ_20191122-fr-BHQ-avgcontrib-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thinking of new ways to make this interesting every month is not easy -- one time we listed out what $22 could buy for our organizers in the early states, another time we even threw in a song lyric. But this month is different. Right now, we're working around the clock here at Booker HQ to make sure Cory qualifies for the December debate. A little more than 24 hours ago, we hit the DNC's individual donor requirement _(to each and every one of our 200,000 individual donors -- we see you and we love you!)_. **Now, all we have left to do is to hit the polling threshold. Will you chip in to help us do it?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191122_BHQ_20191122-fr-BHQ-avgcontrib-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

We've been humbled by the avalanche of support we've seen since Cory was on the debate stage Wednesday night. This truly is what momentum looks like, and it's never been clearer that the American people want to hear more from Cory.
So team, whether you've donated to our campaign or not, whether you're all in for Cory or just believe that the debates are stronger with his voice included, **[please consider chipping in $22 -- or even $5 -- to our campaign today. Folks, **Abuse of power. Obstruction of justice. Contempt of Congress. Bribery.** These are the crimes we now _have evidence_ that President Donald Trump committed. All of this on top of the crimes of bigotry, racism and hatemongering. We knew from day one that Donald Trump weaponized racism and other forms of hate to win an election. Now, we know that he is also a criminal who used the presidency as a vehicle for personal gain and invited foreign powers to interfere with American elections. **Know this****: I will not rest until the President has been held responsible for the harm he has done to our democracy and our nation.[But the road ahead is long, and I need you to stand with me. name: Congressman Paul Gosar
subject: A shameful day in American history
body:
My response to the conclusion of yesterday's Impeachment hearings Yesterday was a very sad for our country. Partisan Democrats, fueled by their rage that Donald Trump was elected our President, have taken a tragic step backward for democracy. With the conclusion of | | | | [](http://event.a1e0.squarespace-mail.com/?ref=I2UAAD_QgR_Im6qziKjUVngsdT2p0BijAQAAAOzWNCWu491B3qb4MioKtOPZ6Abgfd4ovi4DCMG7BuOWSsE5A39VofcDwMYXGfBAejQtAtTjYOhRsYQl8nKWTGOw2HkTPrBflHat9KaQlrY4eIJPwVL35SHPqySUjXEndOlIfGAZJhc8dJ7gy0xHOLeJCuYqESWlnhU5Ek4P2kUR16uhRy_UmJwUXASHOaG772__X0o1clkmCDdQ740PMTR4PEyBbbMNr716B-UtM9k6EJKEkjFcOZTw-kkdfRaVZq8jMyW0LPoLmP9N5slqWjFckbJeyt_8P7DirydQ5yEMbZKfCYXwwm4rY-fREjvvW5WkOb_021I8K_B24KiBo_HHPQCIjMXUI0eVhF2bOlBwdAfm0vZvYa_5W8YEdRXLHFqq7sW1Zbw5RUvpFrcX-249so93fRuhyLevE2x42Dy2pIyYMzBNuLuWWlqPCuyplqeG9rCdUKDObVw-RyIwHt49LwbqGAYgpeAGYeoUZ4xlLTsq85bv48GOATd9bpGiNo_jP14bsIcx49i4g9iAuWqOc-cJszxkVz1w3XrwB-QQ5IS65vGBXcUICXLXnpdqgA)
---
| Yesterday was a very sad for our country. Partisan Democrats, fueled by their rage that Donald Trump was elected _our_ President, have taken a tragic step backward for democracy. With the conclusion of the Impeachment Hearings led by Liberal California Congressman Adam Schiff, the nation is worse for it. Schiff presided over a circus of hearsay and disloyalty in pursuit of the removal of _our_ democratically-elected President.Throughout this sham of a process, I have been vocal in my support of President Trump and will continue to fight for him because _he’s been fighting for all of us_. He’s restored our greatness on the world stage, he’s fought for American workers against the Chinese, and he’s brought our economy roaring back to life.**I’m proud of this President and am letting you know here today, that I plan to seek re-election, so that I can continue to fight by his side for our nation and Arizona.** Please [**join my fight**](http://event.a1e0.squarespace-mail.com/?ref=I2UAACfRptmIrQE5lkFDtNjITf1O1pptAQAAAOzWNCWu491B3qb4MioKtOPZ6Abgfd4ovi4DCMG7BuOWSsE5A39VofcDwMYXGfBAejQtAtTjYOhRsYQl8nKWTGOw2HkTPrBflHat9KaQlrY4eIJPwVL35SHPqySUjXEndPHKKjQMSwpaahkh41F-w1HLlaG4e1miTW9-PQUW8D2YXyglWmJz-8YTvgpxQLni99xoLDzfcTfD6CS8uf3tMkUdEFsYhC_I-389ip56HlC_e9czNxAfFuhHWYPRl3OBZ7BmWwQRRHKgDPzzXINiLUymWE5YLfI6I5HCPjGAQMgGTb-61jQhz_w58WD6O_bl0Q)**** with support for re-election. Can you be one of the first to make a donation in support of this announcement? We are less than a year away and I need all the help I can get from my team.Sincerely,Congressman Paul Gosar (R-AZ)PS - if you [**click here**](http://event.a1e0.squarespace-mail.com/?ref=I2UAACfRptmIrQE5lkFDtNjITf1O1pptAQAAAOzWNCWu491B3qb4MioKtOPZ6Abgfd4ovi4DCMG7BuOWSsE5A39VofcDwMYXGfBAejQtAtTjYOhRsYQl8nKWTGOw2HkTPrBflHat9KaQlrY4eIJPwVL35SHPqySUjXEndPHKKjQMSwpaahkh41F-w1HLlaG4e1miTW9-PQUW8D2YXyglWmJz-8YTvgpxQLni99xoLDzfcTfD6CS8uf3tMkUdEFsYhC_I-389ip56HlC_e9czNxAfFuhHWYPRl3OBZ7BmWwQRRHKgDPzzXINiLUymWE5YLfI6I5HCPjGAQMgGTb-61jQhz_w58WD6O_bl0Q)**,** you can make a donation of $25, $50, $100, $500, or even $1,000. Every bit helps so give whatever you can afford.

---

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: The GOP's defenses of Trump come crumbling down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, This week has been a landslide of admissions, shocking testimonies, and sour faces from Republicans as they watch their concocted defenses of Trump fall to pieces on live television. Each fringe conspiracy theory they've tried to use to distract the public and lie to voters has been discredited. Democrats have an incredible chance to seize upon this moment and turn it into true momentum ahead of the 2020 elections. We can hold onto the House majority, retake the Senate, and kick that walking dumpster out of the White House, but we need to know what your thoughts are right now so this momentum doesn't putter out: **Are you committed to voting Democrat in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcca/6e9863e8/1681f56c/1db0a9ba/3144708719/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/B3SOkBCy") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcca/6e9863e8/1681f56c/1db0a9ba/3144708719/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/B3SOkBCy") Thank you so much for your response \-- your feedback is critical in helping us set our strategy for showing the spray tan disaster in the Oval Office the door in 2020. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcca/6e9863e8/1681f56c/1db0a9b9/3144708719/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191122a.ND-b&refcode2=modZ9ceNpQIxc8wkpcMo")
