name: MI Senate Update
subject: INCREDIBLE ANNOUNCEMENT!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
---
| |
---
Friends: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports the ONLY way Democrats flip the Senate is by winning in Michigan.

**And after a right-wing super PAC just launched attack ads against Gary Peters in Michigan, polls are showing this race TIED. **Now Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are funneling millions into Michigan to buy this seat and tighten their grip on the Senate.
Earlier this week, a group of dedicated donors made an incredibly generous offer to match every contribution, up to our $40,000 goal, so we can protect Michigan's Democratic Senate seat.

**But right now, we're still falling $9,861 short of our goal to protect this important seat.** And in a race this close - with Senate control on the line - falling short just isn't an option.
**That's why for the very first time - and maybe last time - in our campaign, these committed donors are upping the ante: Every donation will be **__TRIPLE MATCHED__**, but ONLY until midnight!**
**Friends - please don't pass up this opportunity. Whether or not we hit this goal could determine Senate control, so Gary's counting on your immediate contribution:**

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

name: Michael Bennet
subject: We owe a great debt to our civil servants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends,

Over the last few days, we've watched a number of dedicated public servants testify before the nation.

They've put their careers on the line to speak the truth.

In response, however, they've been subjected to smear campaigns accusing them of dual loyalty or secret partisan allegiances.

[Let me make one thing clear: I know that these attacks are absolutely baseless and a threat to the very foundation of our democracy. The people who serve our nation around the world as part of the foreign service, our intelligence agencies, and our military are some of the most dedicated patriots I have ever seen.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9f4/134673f2/9a7b499/6997ac97/956799780/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/support-civil-servants?source=EM_PET_B1_112219_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

[We must fight to protect those who uphold our democracy at home and overseas. Will you sign our petition and join me?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9f4/134673f2/9a7b499/6997ac97/956799780/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/support-civil-servants?source=EM_PET_B1_112219_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

Friends, when my mom and her parents rebuilt their shattered lives in America after surviving the Holocaust, they instilled in our family a deep love of this country.

They encouraged us to help develop in other parts of the world a greater understanding of the American values of democracy and freedom.

Both of my parents shared this sense of duty, just as many of these witnesses have. In fact, I was born in New Delhi, India, where my parents were working for the U.S. embassy at the time, serving our country the best way they knew how.

You do not enter public service for fame or grand acclaim. You do so for the love of country, democracy, and freedom. These jobs can be difficult and dangerous, and civil servants should be free from fear of retaliation.

[Yet, Republicans are working to undermine this effort, smearing our diplomats, civil servants, and others who selflessly serve our country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9f4/134673f2/9a7b499/6997ac97/956799780/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/support-civil-servants?source=EM_PET_B1_112219_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

[From day one in the Bennet Administration, I will fight to protect those who uphold our democracy. Will you sign our petition and join me?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9f4/134673f2/9a7b499/6997ac97/956799780/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/support-civil-servants?source=EM_PET_B1_112219_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
---
| | [ADD YOUR NAME: PROTECT CIVIL SERVANTS >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9f4/134673f2/9a7b499/6997ac97/956799780/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/support-civil-servants?source=EM_PET_B1_112219_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
---
Thank you,

Michael
---
| | Paid for by Bennet for America
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This is a story of the Black washerwomen of Atlanta
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
The truth is, when we come together, we can ALL move forward. Racism doesn't just tear apart Black and Brown communities -- it keeps ALL working people down. Racism props up the wealthy... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528b01/45c30650/118ef51bd/66f60afc/1854996827/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Yesterday, I gave a speech at the historic Clark Atlanta University drawing upon the story of an incredible group of Black women. I'd like to take a moment to share it with you.

So, let's go back to 1881.

After the tyranny of slavery, thousands of African Americans came to Atlanta hoping to build new lives, lives full of promise. But what they found was a crushing disappointment. The war for freedom from enslavement had been won, but the fight for equality -- the fight for opportunity -- was only just beginning.

Black women and girls found that pretty much the only work white employers allowed them to do was the work that they'd been forced to do when they had been enslaved: Caring for white families. Thousands of women living in Atlanta scratched out a living as washerwomen.

Monday through Saturday, they made their way to white families, trudging from house to house picking up piles of dirty laundry. They lifted and poured buckets of water into washing tubs. They scrubbed the clothes using soap so caustic it left their hands raw.

All for less than a dollar a day.

It was July 1881, when 20 of Atlanta's Black washerwomen threw down their washboards, formed a union, The Washing Society, and went on strike. They demanded higher wages, and to be treated with a little dignity. The washerwomen had a plan.

Black women led, but soon, the handful of white women washers realized that the only way to better wages was to follow the lead of Black women. In the space of three weeks, 20 women on strike became 200 women, which became 2,000.

The employers struck back. They warned that they would start their own modern industrial laundry service to replace the washerwomen permanently. They threatened the striking washerwomen with huge rent increases and eviction. They got the local police to fine members of the union and to arrest strikers.

And when the city council threatened to intervene, the women sent a public letter to the mayor of Atlanta and said they would not back down. They went right to the heart of the matter, and I quote: "We mean business."

Then it happened. The employers, the city council, the powerful white citizens -- they all backed down. _The women won!_

The implications of this fight were enormous -- and so was the response. As the idea that Black and white workers could make real structural change if they fought side by side began to spark to life, an evil force was once again mobilizing against it.

Racist politicians doubled down. They divided Black people and white people in every moment of every day of every life, using force, violence, and intimidation to oppress Blacks and to ensure that Blacks and whites would never come together to stand up against those in power.

Black history is American history. And American history teaches us that racism has for generations shaped every crucial aspect of our economic and political system.

Racism told white workers not to organize in the South because so long as you're white, you're a little better off than your brother on the line. A little better off -- even though neither of you has a union to protect you or a pension to support you.

Racism told segregated white communities that they should just abandon their public schools, rather than let their kids learn and play with Black children.

And by the 2000s, racism told everyone in Washington to look the other way when the banks were testing out predatory loans in Black and Brown communities. Those banks then spread those loans across the market and crashed the entire economy for all working people.

And to this day racism will whisper the convenient lie to some white people that if your life has problems, you should blame "them" -- people who don't look like you.

The wealthy and well-connected want us to believe that more for your neighbors will always mean less for you.

But, the truth is, when we come together, we can ALL move forward. Racism doesn't just tear apart Black and Brown communities -- it keeps ALL working people down. Racism props up the wealthy and powerful, leaving them free to take more wealth and more power for themselves.

Donald Trump didn't create this divide and conquer system. But he wouldn't be in power without it. After eight years of progress under President Obama, Trump's embrace of white supremacy, white nationalism, and corruption threaten to break our democracy beyond repair.

Divide and conquer is an old political tactic -- and it comes in all sorts of ugly flavors: Racist, sexist, homophobic, transphobic, xenophobic. It's the phobic -- that's the key part. Because it's all about fear.

Politics based in fear. The rich and powerful want us to be afraid of each other. Why? Because they're afraid of us. Afraid of our numbers. Afraid of seeing us stand together. Afraid that we will take up each other's fights as our own.

_Afraid that they will lose their power._

In the face of racism, hatred, bigotry, and corruption -- Black history, American history, teaches us how to confront this moment of challenge. Black history teaches us how to stand up when we're told to sit down. How to speak out when we're told to be silent. And how to march on when the road gets rough.

Now more than ever, all of us have to embrace the lessons of Black history. The rich and powerful aren't going to just give away their power. No, if we want power, we have to fight for it!

Like the women of the Washing Society, that is exactly what we will do.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| **Yesterday, Elizabeth gave a speech about the Atlanta washerwomens' strike of 1881. She spoke about what's possible when working women fight side by side -- and persist against all odds.

Now, it's our moment to take up the fight. Chip in if you're ready to dream big, fight hard, and win.**

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528b01/45c30650/118ef51bd/66f60aff/1854996827/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDFBRl9STFRfU0NIX0VfMjAxOTExMjJfVjFTMyJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML1AF_RLT_SCH_E_20191122_V1S3")
---
| | | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528b01/45c30650/118ef51bd/66f60afe/1854996827/VEsF/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528b01/45c30650/118ef51bd/66f60ae1/1854996827/VEsC/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528b01/45c30650/118ef51bd/66f60ae0/1854996827/VEsD/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528b01/45c30650/118ef51bd/66f60ae3/1854996827/VEsA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528b01/45c30650/118ef51bd/66f60ae2/1854996827/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528b01/45c30650/118ef51bd/66f60ae5/1854996827/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

body:

subject: 📝10,000 signatures to DECRIMINALIZE marijuana
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: Do you agree we must DECRIMINALIZE marijuana?
---
| | | 10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: I've seen the evidence, and it's clear: Criminalizing marijuana disproportionately harms communities of color like mine. **Do you agree we must DECRIMINALIZE marijuana?** _[**_YES! >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b412/18e32a7f/5039d526/7b22cc40/2621516884/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-urge-congress-to-decriminalize-marijuana-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-ben-ray-lujan&redirect=https://bit.ly/2OaT9ny")_** _**[_No_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b412/18e32a7f/5039d526/7b22cc40/2621516884/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-urge-congress-to-decriminalize-marijuana-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-ben-ray-lujan&redirect=https://bit.ly/2OaT9ny")**_**
---

I've seen the evidence firsthand.

Criminalizing marijuana does significant harm -- especially for communities of color like mine.

I've read countless studies showing people of color are much more likely to be arrested for minor, non-violent marijuana use -- even though its use is the SAME across all racial groups.

And due to mandatory minimums, we are locking up hundreds of thousands of non-violent, first-time offenders.

**That 's an injustice we must correct.**

**[_I need 10,000 responses before midnight to prove Americans want real criminal justice reform NOW. We can 't ignore the overwhelming evidence. Will you speak out with me if you agree we need to decriminalize marijuana? >> _](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b412/18e32a7f/5039d526/7b22cc40/2621516884/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-urge-congress-to-decriminalize-marijuana-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-ben-ray-lujan&redirect=https://bit.ly/2OaT9ny")**

Thank you,

Ben Ray Lujan

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b412/18e32a7f/5039d526/7b22cc41/2621516884/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b412/18e32a7f/5039d526/7b22cc46/2621516884/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b412/18e32a7f/5039d526/7b22cc47/2621516884/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b412/18e32a7f/5039d526/7b22cc44/2621516884/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b412/18e32a7f/5039d526/7b22cc45/2621516884/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b412/18e32a7f/5039d526/7b22cc7a/2621516884/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I've exposed Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Congress
body:
If you have watched any of the impeachment hearings, seen President Trump's twitter feed - then you know who I am.
Don't want to receive anymore emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6651019/136068195/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MTM2MDY4MTk1LjE1NzQ5NmUzYWI1NjZlNTRkZjhhOGE5ZGEyMmI2NDkyJm49VCZsPWEtZ3Mmbz02NjUxMDE5&x=489f5972)

[](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6651019/136068195/116679/2/) Fellow Conservative,

If you have watched any of the impeachment hearings, seen President Trump's twitter feed - then you know who I am.

I am Rep. Elise Stefanik and I am the 35-year-old Republican Congresswoman standing between the Democrats and our American Democracy.

The House Democrats are trying to cover up the truth about President Trump from the American people! During this week's first public impeachment hearings after weeks of secret meetings and depositions, Chairman Adam Schiff continuously interrupted and tried to block Republican members from asking questions.

_**The Leftist Democrats don't want us to ask questions because they don't want the American people to hear the answers: They know that their entire impeachment inquiry is based on lies and secrecy!**_

Far-left Democrats are pouring money into my district to defeat me, you, and President Trump. [**Donate NOW to stand up with me for our President and our country.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6651019/136068195/116679/3/)

Adam Schiff's abuse of power is vile and disgusting! He is hijacking the impeachment proceedings and trying to take down President Trump by preventing Republicans from revealing the truth about the Democrats' failing impeachment inquiry.

**The Leftist Democrats know that America wants another four years for President Trump, and now they're trying to overturn the will of the American people by hiding the facts.**

**[Click here to donate to tell the Leftist Democrats that we will stand with President Trump against their lies and deception>>>](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6651019/136068195/116679/4/)**

I was the first Member to call out Adam Schiff for having secret access to the whistleblower without notifying the Intel Committee. He is the only Member whose staff coordinated directly with the whistleblower, whose lawyer has been calling for a "coup" against the President of the United States since President Trump's first day in office. We will not allow the Leftist Democrats to subvert the will of the people and destroy our American values! [**CONTRIBUTE** ](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6651019/136068195/116679/5/) Here are the FACTS that the Democrats don't want you to know:
1. The Trump Administration provided defensive lethal aid to Ukraine... **the Obama Administration DID NOT.**
2. There was **NO investigation into Joe Biden**.
3. **Obama's own State Department was so concerned with Hunter Biden's role at Burisma** that they raised the problem while preparing the Ambassador for her confirmation.

Chairman Schiff and the House Democrats chose partisan attacks and obstruction of the truth over answers for the American public. **[Now it's time for us to choose to stand with the President against these deceitful, misleading attacks.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6651019/136068195/116679/6/)**

Since I've exposed Adam Schiff and his Regime of Secrecy in front of millions of Americans, the far-left Socialist Democrats are trying to attack me. The leftist Democrats have already come after me with sexist comments and blatant lies. They are trying to tear down Republican women, but we will not stop standing with the President and fighting for American values!

**[Please donate any amount to my campaign to send a message to the Democrats that we are standing with President Trump and we will not stop fighting for the truth.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6651019/136068195/116679/7/)** [**CONTRIBUTE** ](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6651019/136068195/116679/8/) Thank you for your continued support and encouragement.

Sincerely,

Elise Stefanik
| | Paid for by Elise for Congress
---
| PO Box 1003, Alexandria, VA 22313
---

---
|

name: James Mackler
subject: Our national security is under attack.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
This greatly disturbs me ->
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa236/18d6a294/4cee86ee/26d63cfd/971499162/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Our national security is under attack. Recently, we've learned of the "domestic political errand" that an Ambassador - who bought their cushy post with timely political contributions - pursued at the expense of our national security and international alliances. **It 's wrong. And as a veteran, I'm deeply disturbed our elected leaders would risk the safety of our country for their own personal political gain.** I'm running because I'm sick and tired of business as usual in Washington. I'm sick and tired of leaders picking special interests and their own political interests over the interests of the very people they've sworn an oath to represent. Tennessee needs a senator who will stand up for what's right and stand up to any president when they're wrong. I'm prepared to be that senator for Tennessee. [_**If we 're going to change business as usual in Washington, then we need to do it together. [_**Please, do NOT STOP reading this email until you reach the end.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12131987/124382351/10128690?refcode=20191122-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-AC&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=e2cd0aa3-7c0d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmNkMGFhMy03YzBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFnJmFjdT7dbIMzKVNNbxxJFg4lvdPP2oPhrbG0N2fQ=)
We’ve always known how much Kevin McCarthy _adores_ Trump.

He’s hosted big fancy fundraisers with Trump.

_(One fundraiser raised over $13 MILLION to spend electing more Republicans!)_

He’s praised Trump constantly on FOX News.

He spews virtually ALL of Trump’s absurd talking points.

But Peter, yesterday marked a new LOW for Kevin McCarthy...

[**Even after Ambassador Sondland’s testimony (under oath!) that there was an explicit and undeniable BRIBERY attempt by Trump to have the Biden family investigated by the Ukraine, he told a Washington Post reporter this:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12131988/124382352/10128690?refcode=20191122-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-AC&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=e2cd0aa3-7c0d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmNkMGFhMy03YzBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFnJmFjdT7dbIMzKVNNbxxJFg4lvdPP2oPhrbG0N2fQ=)
[**"I think it was very clear. There was no quid-pro-quo."**
\- Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12131989/124382353/10128690?refcode=20191122-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-AC&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=e2cd0aa3-7c0d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmNkMGFhMy03YzBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFnJmFjdT7dbIMzKVNNbxxJFg4lvdPP2oPhrbG0N2fQ=)
---
[**Peter -- Kevin McCarthy thinks Trump is INNOCENT.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12131990/124382354/10128690?refcode=20191122-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-AC&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=e2cd0aa3-7c0d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmNkMGFhMy03YzBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFnJmFjdT7dbIMzKVNNbxxJFg4lvdPP2oPhrbG0N2fQ=)

But it doesn’t end there...

[**After the final House impeachment hearing yesterday, McCarthy pathetically spewed off Trump and Devin Nunes’ latest conspiratorial claim that it was Ukraine --_not Russia_ \-- who meddled in the 2016 Election. A CNN reporter said this about their conversation:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12131991/124382355/10128690?refcode=20191122-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-AC&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=e2cd0aa3-7c0d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmNkMGFhMy03YzBkLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFnJmFjdT7dbIMzKVNNbxxJFg4lvdPP2oPhrbG0N2fQ=)
[He also rejected [former National Security Council senior director] Fiona Hill’s testimony and said he thinks Ukraine meddled in 2016 elections.

**"I think [the Ukraine] did."**

subject: A great education
body:
The next generation of Hoosiers will lead Indiana into a future of innovation, growth and discovery. But right now, they’re in schools across the.....

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/a-great-education?e=1acd9bb3d6)

A Great Education

The next generation of Hoosiers will lead Indiana into a future of innovation, growth and discovery. But right now, they’re in schools across the state, and it’s critical that these young Hoosiers receive the best education possible.

That’s why it’s vital that Indiana works to retain and attract great teachers, and make sure we continue to improve policies that provide for a great education.

And I can tell you and the Hoosiers who visited the Statehouse this week that our teachers, parents, and students have allies and partners in our state capitol. Governor Holcomb is committed to increasing teacher compensation, and progress is already underway. Earlier this year, he directed the state to pay $150 million in local school pension liability – freeing $150 million in local school budgets across Indiana that’s now available to give our teachers a well-deserved raise.

It doesn’t stop there. Since 2017, Governor Holcomb and the Indiana General Assembly have increased education funding by $1.6 billion cumulatively, including by $763 million just this budget cycle. More low-income kids have access to high-quality Pre-K options, computer science will be offered in every K-12 school by 2021, and $19 million has been invested in making Indiana’s schools safer for all.

But we know that our work isn’t done, and that a great education is what every student deserves. That’s why Hoosier students and teachers will continue to be a top priority – now, and always.

-Kyle Hupfer
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was
Keeping Hoosiers Connected:
Largest Single-State Investment in Broadband Keeps Growing

Big news! Governor Holcomb is continuing to expand broadband access, as the state’s largest single state investment in broadband keeps on growing! Indiana’s Next Level Broadband grants are growing in this first round to $28.4 million (with a new $6.3 million announced this week) to expand critical broadband infrastructure and help Hoosiers in 18 counties stay connected.

Governor Holcomb believes that in the 21st century, access to high-quality, affordable broadband is essential to Hoosiers’ success. High-quality broadband will drive economic development, improve the health of Hoosiers, provide more educational opportunities and greatly improve quality of life. The total first round funding will provide broadband infrastructure to more than 11,300 homes and commercial locations!

Also – more big news yesterday: While at this week’s Republican Governors Association meeting, Governor Holcomb was re-elected as the RGA’s policy chairman. Governor Holcomb first joined the RGA’s executive committee in 2017, and as policy chairman, Governor Holcomb is responsible for elevating the proven policies that Republican governors are bringing to Americans in states across the country -- including right here in Indiana.
Thank You, Speaker Bosma

Speaker of the Indiana House of Representatives Brian Bosma announced this week that the 2020 legislative session will be his last. Speaker Bosma has served Hoosiers for 34 years as a state representative, and has served as speaker for 12 years. During his tenure, he’s helped lead Indiana’s turnaround from a middle-of-the-pack state to a leader in balanced budgets, a growing economy, top-ranked infrastructure and more. Thank you, Speaker Bosma, for your service.

"Our party is stronger because of Speaker Bosma’s leadership and Indiana is better because of his decades of service. We’re grateful for all Brian’s done to make Indiana better and congratulate him on a well-earned retirement,” said Chairman Kyle Hupfer.
Welcome Back Home, VP Pence!

It’s always a great week to welcome Vice President Mike Pence back home again to Indiana. He was in Indianapolis on Wednesday to speak at Strada Education Network's National Symposium, where he discussed the need for increased career and technical training to help more Americans fill the high-wage jobs that are available in today’s economy.
https://www.wibc.com/tonykatzradio?mc_cid=ceb4e2da8d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not reply to this email as this address is not monitored.
We believe that email is a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters, but you can click [here](http://url6083.hunt4congress.com/wf/unsubscribe?upn=enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHB8JQPLvmw8rA5dKQOp3z7gDZg2M7zPxJoszGNcu6J1VMpQPuhbpoOJImFM2xJPAgwcI-2FHrULPOfrQQ2LR-2FRB-2FdID6lb0LkNs4PCWVSesv4bCSMV-2FWO4xAAFEo6eg-2BQ4scnZ-2FyKkVnhbu5B3EiXek1WUWVEaTTQqODZBfqrMTfmF6BtZ-2FfZn587szpJDQziRybNFhyLrH1CJrQYWOOVqjl-2FK5cgvMqpmXfsgITm2LK1OUc5cZoIszOMRsktQTc5EyiMYRoHU7RYe1nCUmXYRwmY92fH4WOQ1hGJE5H-2B3DSNV5sHtgigXXzaexlR-2FTkR6TI6RsA31VSx4LTRIRN8ZECMge8YW0ADxHm1Eqkj5D0fU-2BKeKqaZIutCpAMln3tF-2BnvQ5RdOxS0Qoz3O5VMxxqI9bSW8vzqW7fd-2BJYCf0Mv6-2BoLYQR2OYvFb77KuzJsTLchujakI-2BctLUpwGb51YAMoM8Qa3oLDR6lRyOEk-2FOsK8J566nWAsFPUE9gQU9gTfo-2B6Gqq15rsZOkvfLpYBuNaPpG-2F8ZoEUUumjf0w7aLtR4t4WO7uo7RMJZAuEwzaz07-2FEMja-2Ff1lbuXMWJadu34TRS4wJo4Nm7DdPz-2FLFiYmNwEyhHFPBODbJCOc09SLhfurmggh-2B746u91zs-2Bn-2FydON5) if you would like to unsubscribe from these messages.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Tell Congress: Healthcare is not a partisan political tool
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, The run-up to the 2020 Democratic primary has heavily featured the candidates' differing plans to achieve our shared healthcare goals: ensuring that every American is covered, that healthcare costs don't bankrupt our families, and that we get the treatment we deserve. MEANWHILE, the GOP is doing everything it can to undermine the progress we've made. They've never stopped trying to repeal the ACA in Congress AND in the courts, leaving no safety net for people with pre-existing conditions and harming the health of millions. The only reason we didn't lose our healthcare in 2017 was that America spoke up and flooded congressional offices with calls and emails and letters demanding their representatives and senators do their jobs and not play political games with our healthcare. [**But we are at another turning point -- and we need everyone to stand up and make their voices heard if we 're going to finally make healthcare a human right in this country. If you agree that we need to stop treating healthcare like a political pawn, then please add your name to ours.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdccb/6e9863e8/1683c424/1db0a89e/2459337449/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/medicareforall/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdccb/6e9863e8/1683c424/1db0a89e/2459337449/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/medicareforall/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

| Team,

We're coming up on our end-of-week deadline, and right now, we're only 63% of the way to raising $25,000.

We need to hit every goal to keep Ed in the fights on the issues that matter most to the people of Massachusetts and across the country.

The early funds we can raise now will be critical for winning, and Ed is counting on you.

name: Sheriff Joe Arpaio
subject: The end of my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Re-Elect Sheriff Joe Arpaio
body:
The DC establishment is desperate to keep me out of office because they know my tough-as-nails attitude will get the job done.The DC establishment is desperate to keep me out of office because they know my tough-as-nails attitude will get the job done. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_s=e82d7906372c4a41a05b3b33dde6a944&_t=rEKTJYyk-7ezzLqkuPxJCRvVZQNKaF62I5Y06hpuxqmsWI-XBnIL21T0HnV1DTwA4oqB0qtOIAcF16txsA95lfd35CY3ySdix-_zLbB4boiq8kZY6whkXkQpzFe5YgCKrj6743rV_8oZSvD7hoRpzKPObIi20d9AKwUP6BraDuI%3D) | [](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=e82d7906372c4a41a05b3b33dde6a944&_e=p20rcqCJbXlyFZl2eNxfZ8TbOhQuVx8ieU08NwcHK4dnfjK4sscNUtmov7B4HvPoNUXMKg7nwVdG_5EKrrauHErHSRACZpyfjlEPsoFpPZtp2voaMvF7YlAT86w2KyZNBSIBNv6KpMvMkKV8Gx7dLyuB7NozdOlvAC0Nio7OzT485c_3BXHR3QFJMrvZ9vqU0zoLtmEhEsdx0UunMjePvraQek5A3aaJZw4fo_sjqhSD-MkVsh1p_twvbowo28iT5MRDdhbNjKeqtmiahf0HeYNv_dTdSnP6NhuuTqJV6zjryl06jZLFfK4dGo5EtqFbYzc3GItXpQbqTcQFbCdN8amwr3NsI_3_X01Go_dAQS1-du6hSu9hwjpSuGUvSejYMBHNORaRhCEraZnu5VZ-Ww%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

My campaign is facing a make or break moment and I’ll be blunt, I’m starting to feel the pressure. **[In one week, I will be facing a major fundraising deadline and if I can’t raise $16,390 before time runs out –](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=e82d7906372c4a41a05b3b33dde6a944&_e=p20rcqCJbXlyFZl2eNxfZ8TbOhQuVx8ieU08NwcHK4dnfjK4sscNUtmov7B4HvPoNUXMKg7nwVdG_5EKrrauHErHSRACZpyfjlEPsoFpPZtp2voaMvF7YlAT86w2KyZNBSIBNv6KpMvMkKV8Gx7dLyuB7NozdOlvAC0Nio7OzT485c_3BXHR3QFJMrvZ9vqUrQnJVj0CZm2AjrnvVa2nP_vyTcWC5gs0wv-kScmE8k42NOtfbQpVOH7u-kGIj9zx9PBX13tMYVneG08VfxlBau32bURKTlUcB96o3z6x3wWSLwCiM-0XGXAG0dwdBjjW2Q6j7aarSCrz_OhK2G0Sn5SGSHyfEbw08CFqJwveonmEBpfVAHjXLqTFN5LfmAKDHxsDoBtKJcraoewXIP6bpQ%3D%3D)** this might be the end of my campaign.

_I am pleading with you_ , don’t let that happen. **[Friend, would you chip in $25 or more today to keep my campaign alive into December?](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=e82d7906372c4a41a05b3b33dde6a944&_e=p20rcqCJbXlyFZl2eNxfZ8TbOhQuVx8ieU08NwcHK4dnfjK4sscNUtmov7B4HvPoNUXMKg7nwVdG_5EKrrauHErHSRACZpyfjlEPsoFpPZtp2voaMvF7YlAT86w2KyZNBSIBNv6KpMvMkKV8Gx7dLyuB7NozdOlvAC0Nio7OzT69zik2WvO7wJqRLzrVtwP35PeOSCXR6V0n82SZeY8U_cQ4CcgDTFiCwH7-eIy8FZiJr49tnCOpXjBc9awMuv0G7xMLSTZ1VRL6xSNBFE16Z-HtmWBARz8L8SvYTMUNYxAZmpQxLJjd1HzjOUHt3iyjjN5ePTts0ZUBOaY5DDoQN_bqedcgyFTwq5djmCcMthgq8isDTPfzRwsoN7j0jZ7NgSzx4vUHtV9IdHeEiIqhog%3D%3D)**
| [**_Fuel_ Joe’s December ⇨**](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=e82d7906372c4a41a05b3b33dde6a944&_e=p20rcqCJbXlyFZl2eNxfZ8TbOhQuVx8ieU08NwcHK4dnfjK4sscNUtmov7B4HvPoNUXMKg7nwVdG_5EKrrauHErHSRACZpyfjlEPsoFpPZtp2voaMvF7YlAT86w2KyZNBSIBNv6KpMvMkKV8Gx7dLyuB7NozdOlvAC0Nio7OzT485c_3BXHR3QFJMrvZ9vqUjw-et7rnOx3QGlq45bffej0s3gYV39HOGZBSzECUu6wooEnw87L_XQ19FILWsGm1j3kpJGk7OWO7dEeXC07yk6rdDkPwGZpVblSlcrGKf0g_6ItGd-fT4AVtbb1FXYfeA83XTvzcrXAxasfm9IwfsCc2R_ixXljkdtEW7PsoBIfwtbOK1alFMIHMZOlr8pUFPogFeEzVV3f_3GLolTj3xA%3D%3D)
---

Since announcing my campaign to be re-elected Sheriff of Maricopa County – I have been relentlessly attacked by the liberal media and DC establishment. They want to keep me OUT of office because they know my **tough-as-nails** attitude is **exactly** what our country needs.

But you know me, I will never cower to the Radical Left or stop talking about the issues facing this country – the stakes are too high!

**[Friend, I still need to raise $16,390 before the end of the month. Can I count on having your support?](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=e82d7906372c4a41a05b3b33dde6a944&_e=p20rcqCJbXlyFZl2eNxfZ8TbOhQuVx8ieU08NwcHK4dnfjK4sscNUtmov7B4HvPoNUXMKg7nwVdG_5EKrrauHErHSRACZpyfjlEPsoFpPZtp2voaMvF7YlAT86w2KyZNBSIBNv6KpMvMkKV8Gx7dLyuB7NozdOlvAC0Nio7OzT485c_3BXHR3QFJMrvZ9vqU3Q4p8qNMx2W4D_AeurhUpizVZulpSSXePwkv-thoEhaA0gis7gFlO8lEagKdQg6rdGBAwS99ZwbwhrKiY4LBg4CJCDNRs6Xiw-4_nbFxrUwkmM50-Pw6CPUfuyiikARhKclgnm0U-4v6Ab2V10xBbYJVu_B6y1EITma_-eyBKxMDKkVp5s3vQ5_sIMYveWw5V_KcktMjFRrIaK_FG5rbJw%3D%3D)**

For America,

Sheriff Joe Arpaio
[**_Fuel_ Joe’s December ⇨**](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=e82d7906372c4a41a05b3b33dde6a944&_e=p20rcqCJbXlyFZl2eNxfZ8TbOhQuVx8ieU08NwcHK4dnfjK4sscNUtmov7B4HvPoNUXMKg7nwVdG_5EKrrauHErHSRACZpyfjlEPsoFpPZtp2voaMvF7YlAT86w2KyZNBSIBNv6KpMvMkKV8Gx7dLyuB7NozdOlvAC0Nio7OzT485c_3BXHR3QFJMrvZ9vqURkR2BPFbeDLi6sBeZ77EXvLW1L5eHOUPx9aM9N8AW37SVHHvYb03Mmoe7fcJGYMYweYmO7gA114TyrrMrRXgV-mDzd44OylPPL702b-nrrrKDZGVIAGQFQ1vhLEj6zOuJiAsqK_qttIrutFMvmt8LjoecMdrmF8ONQTnCVi7im15W-puhqF7e7vp5-ETIPEaAh3AA0nLBe-WHBu7sAw-yQ%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20LaTurner?=
subject: 🚩Watkins Supports Bloomberg Style Background Checks 🚩
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Hear it straight from him. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/64a230614c32/for-immediate-release-kansas-state-treasurer-jake-laturner-announces-candidacy-for-us-congress-5579037?e=1050d051da)
---
| | | | Patriot,

Perhaps you saw the news we shared yesterday about [Representative Steve Watkins deliberately voting against the National Rifle Association on a bill protecting sportsmen's rights.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a9d4863c60&e=1050d051da) It's unthinkable for a supposedly conservative Republican from Kansas who was elected on his campaign promises to protect our 2nd amendment rights to then turn around and reject the NRA and side with AOC and Pelosi on a gun rights vote.
_**But the truth is, Steve Watkins actually has a HISTORY of supporting gun control.**_
[Hear it here from his own mouth:](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9751463e40&e=1050d051da)
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=029bf2bc44&e=1050d051da)
---
| Background checks are a direct violation of our right to bear arms. We must have a Congressman who stands firm on the protection of the 2nd amendment, not one that bends here and there when it suits him.

As a State Senator, Jake LaTurner carried constitutional carry on the Senate floor and voted against the left’s gun control agenda every single time. He can be counted on to lead the fight for the Second Amendment in Congress.

---
| [DONATE to Stand up for the 2nd Amendment!](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d01ffb9eea&e=1050d051da "DONATE to Stand up for the 2nd Amendment!")

name: Rob Portman
subject: China is Stealing Your Tax Dollars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Portman for Senate Committee | [Privacy Policy](http://www
body:
Peter -- We just uncovered some very troubling news. Over the last two decades, the China Communist Party has paid researchers and scientists based here in the United States to send taxpayer-funded research back to China. It is appalling and unacceptable that American tax dollars are helping China’s economy and military, and I need your help to stop it. Earlier this week, my Permanent Subcommittee on Investigations (PSI) released a report detailing that over 7,000 experts here in the United States are essentially on the Chinese government payroll. This “Thousand Talents Plan” is a coordinated effort to undermine our military and economic superiority, and for years, the United States has failed to have develop a comprehensive strategy to address it. I took the lead in uncovering this national security threat, and I’m working to make sure your tax dollars don’t end up helping China. [Click here](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=BOmOfc2awqbnUFozc_U8n7_dUZ3uG4soU0zaz8PFALu77NAf8UR5rtnyzJ9Y8CdHybphxZ24ekc_A5H2zTCNu-cFrRvNULy7yDHI_FFqghrj76HrFT3sQNSu4V2PKw3FI5fNNj9oTRjPLK0vPCJ4iMct_p0F4Sm0hBjbEd4XmcU&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191122_china_psi_2&n=1) to read more on the report, and I hope you find this as troubling as I do. All best, Rob Portman P.S. – If you want to help us continue to fight against the threat of China, [please click here to donate $10, $20, or $50 to my re-election effort.](https://www.robportman.com/donation_v2?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191122_china_psi_2&n=2) [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sYYV_ledEgoYeQO-o30kdJeTLiOkPFE0-_P396RlgQw&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191122_china_psi_2&n=3)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tgt5i9qzFHm-zEGuH8vKJ58&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191122_china_psi_2&n=4)[

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: The debate showed why the Democrats need to lose power.
body:
The extremism on display was staggering. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/this-impeachment-drama-is-hurting-america-1523893?e=90fad69796)
---
| | [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=eb8477527a&e=90fad69796)
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=8a51847a6b&e=90fad69796)
---
| | Peter, The extremism on display in the Democrat Debate was staggering.

The candidates pushed harmful policy after harmful policy that would destroy our economy and subvert our values. Here's just a few of their crazy ideas.
* Impeach the duly elected president
* Use your tax dollars for abortion till birth
* Ban private healthcare
* Open the border

These policies would hurt Iowans, especially the middle-class, whose pockets would be raided to pay for these candidates' crazy proposals.

I firmly believe President Trump will win in 2020, but we can't send him back to Washington for four more years with a Congress filled with the same kind of extremism.

We have to flip the House in 2020 and give the president a conservative House so that he can deliver for the American people. We can't leave him with this band of extreme obstructionists.

[**Will you donate $5, $25, $50, $100, $250 or even $500 to help us win this district and flip the House in 2020? It's critically important.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=babe4fff5e&e=90fad69796)
---
| [Donate Now ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=fddfd11b5b&e=90fad69796 "Donate Now ›")
---
| This is a conservative district. It voted for President Trump by five points in 2016. We can flip it, I'm sure of it, but it's going to take resources that the other side is going to have in spades from the coasts.

There are only a few dozen competitive House races each year, and my race in IA-02 is going to be one of the most competitive. If we want to win the House back, we must win Iowa's 2nd Congressional District.

[**Please consider donating $5, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or anything you can today so that we can flip IA-02 and send these extreme Democrats packing **](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=c6f5c2dd85&e=90fad69796)

For Iowa,

Bobby Schilling

name: Addisu Demissie
subject: Joe Biden, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, Pete Buttigieg, Kamala Harris, and Amy Klobuchar.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team -- in case you missed Wednesday's debate, here's what went down: Even though his podium was all the way on the edge of the stage, **Cory Booker broke out to win the night, making it clear that he deserves a spot at the December debate.[If you agree, please click here to chip in to our campaign.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191122_AD_20191122-fr-AD-memo-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** He used his first opportunity to speak on stage to focus on growing wealth in disadvantaged communities. He spoke passionately about not only raising the minimum wage but also about fostering Black entrepreneurship. He spoke about his family's roots, as well as his lived experience representing a majority Black and Brown community. He didn't shy away from policy differences with other candidates but always brought it back to a message of unity in the face of Donald Trump's division. And in his impromptu closing statement, he made the case to voters as to why he belongs on the December debate stage -- and they are responding. _We raised more in the first 22 minutes of the 11 p.m. hour than we did in the twelve hours following the third and fourth debates... combined._ **Cory showed us why he has the temperament and leadership style needed to unite the party to defeat Donald Trump. But right now, he has not yet qualified for the December debate.** In fact, the only candidates that have qualified are Joe Biden, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, Pete Buttigieg, Kamala Harris, and Amy Klobuchar. **[If you believe in Cory's voice and that he should be on the stage in December, please donate to our campaign today. We can't do it without you.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191122_AD_20191122-fr-AD-memo-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks,
Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191122_AD_20191122-fr-AD-memo-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1b/5fca0d19/79294627/291c5957/1339166264/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1b/5fca0d19/79294627/291c5956/1339166264/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1b/5fca0d19/79294627/291c5955/1339166264/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1b/5fca0d19/79294627/291c5954/1339166264/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: Shannon Salk, Team Hickenlooper
subject: John's note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
It's going to take a full team effort to take this seat back from Cory Gardner. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771453/691c9bd/6f9d0db4/11a7d891/170731013/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

I just wanted to make sure you saw John's note from yesterday because what he talks about is so important.

As it becomes more clear that this race is a toss-up, Trump and McConnell are rushing to Cory Gardner's side to try to hold the Senate majority--and it's going to take a full team effort to fight back.

Check out John's note, then please **chip in whatever you can before our monthly deadline:** [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191122_SS_20191122-fr-SS-EOMlaunchkick-2mo_2mo_contribbutton1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,
Shannon

Shannon Salk
National Finance Director
Hickenlooper for Colorado

\-----FORWARDED MESSAGE-----

**From:** John Hickenlooper
**Subject:** They're sparing no expense.
**Date:** Thurs, Nov 21, 2019

Friend,

November's been a game-changing month for this race.

**Democrats ' chances of winning back the Senate hinge on Colorado--and a lot of people have taken notice. Both _FiveThirtyEight_ and _Roll Call_ confirmed this is one of the most flippable Senate seats in the entire country, and _POLITICO_ just called our race a toss-up.**

In response, Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump have ramped up their efforts to hang on to the majority. Here's just some of what they've been up to:
* Trump fundraised for senators who he's hoping will back him on impeachment, convincing his online supporters to donate over $100,000 to Cory Gardner.
* On top of that, Trump has been headlining high-dollar fundraisers in-person for Gardner.
* Mitch McConnell is calling in favors from special interests to direct dark money to races that will decide the Senate majority.**We expect them to spend big time here.**
* That's all happening right now... and we're just under a year out! As Donald Trump gets more desperate over impeachment, and as Mitch McConnell gets more worried about losing his Senate majority, we can expect these efforts to get even more intense.

We've made big strides in closing the fundraising gap since we launched this campaign. But fighting back against their fundraising juggernaut is going to take a full team effort.

[**_Can you chip in for the first time to get a head start on our November monthly deadline?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191122_SS_20191122-fr-SS-EOMlaunchkick-2mo_ndnr_l&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191122_SS_20191122-fr-SS-EOMlaunchkick-2mo_2mo_contribbutton2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771453/691c9bd/6f9d0db4/11a7d88b/170731013/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771453/691c9bd/6f9d0db4/11a7d888/170731013/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771453/691c9bd/6f9d0db4/11a7d889/170731013/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771453/691c9bd/6f9d0db4/11a7d886/170731013/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771453/691c9bd/6f9d0db4/11a7d887/170731013/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771453/691c9bd/6f9d0db4/11a7d88a/170731013/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").
clean_body: It's going to take a full team effort to take this seat back from Cory Gardner. | | | "" | Team, I just wanted to make sure you saw John's note from yesterday because what he talks about is so important. As it becomes more clear that this race is a toss-up, Trump and McConnell are rushing to Cory Gardner's side to try to hold the Senate majority--and it's going to take a full team effort to fight back. Check out John's note, then please chip in whatever you can before our monthly deadline: "=" Thank you, Shannon Shannon Salk National Finance Director Hickenlooper for Colorado \-----FORWARDED MESSAGE----- From: John Hickenlooper Subject: They're sparing no expense. Date: Thurs, Nov 21, 2019 Friend, November's been a game-changing month for this race. Democrats ' chances of winning back the Senate hinge on Colorado--and a lot of people have taken notice. Both FiveThirtyEight and Roll Call confirmed this is one of the most flippable Senate seats in the entire country, and POLITICO just called our race a toss-up. In response, Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump have ramped up their efforts to hang on to the majority. Here's just some of what they've been up to: Trump fundraised for senators who he's hoping will back him on impeachment, convincing his online supporters to donate over $100,000 to Cory Gardner. On top of that, Trump has been headlining high-dollar fundraisers in-person for Gardner. Mitch McConnell is calling in favors from special interests to direct dark money to races that will decide the Senate majority.We expect them to spend big time here. That's all happening right now... and we're just under a year out! As Donald Trump gets more desperate over impeachment, and as Mitch McConnell gets more worried about losing his Senate majority, we can expect these efforts to get even more intense. We've made big strides in closing the fundraising gap since we launched this campaign. But fighting back against their fundraising juggernaut is going to take a full team effort. "=" Thank you, John "=" | | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218 Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible. If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by "". Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on "", "", "", and "". We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe "". If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information "".

name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi?=
subject: Canvassing Builds the Political Revolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heidi Sloan for Congress
body:
This weekend we're block walking Friday, Saturday, and Sunday to build our movement in Texas. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=2c416a518e&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | -

This weekend we're hitting the pavement to talk to our neighbors about our class-struggle campaign for Congress and Childcare for All. We don't have the money that corporate candidates and the establishment can bring in, but we do have people––that's how we're going to build this political revolution.**We need to have thousands of conversations with friends, neighbors, co-workers, and at door steps if we want a chance of sending a democratic socialist from Texas to the halls of Congress in 2021.**

Along with spreading our message to thousands of people in in TX-25, our campaign's field program has already trained hundreds of volunteers to canvass––arming them with the skills we'll all need to build a political revolution in Texas and beyond. Canvassing helps us learn how to think quickly on our feet, connect our personal experience to politics, and transform ourselves into political agents. **Bringing someone into our movement at their doorstep is the best feeling in the world. We've got three opportunities for y'all to come try this out and see for yourself this weekend:** [**Friday Night Speed Canvass - Friday November 22nd, 5 PM**](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=fb391629e8&e=c169cb0a8e)
[Quack's 43rd Street Bakery
411 E 43rd St, Austin, Texas 78751](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=3d514d53df&e=c169cb0a8e)

[**Canvass for Heidi in Wimberly - Saturday November 23rd, 11 AM**](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=96c3df83d0&e=c169cb0a8e)
[Cypress Creek Nature Trail
Wimberley, Texas 78676](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=087ad3e607&e=c169cb0a8e)

[**Canvass for Heidi and Childcare for All - Sunday November 24th, 11 AM**](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=32cd2c5f0d&e=c169cb0a8e)
[Eastwoods Park
3001 Harris Park Ave, Austin, Texas 78705](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=ce63c75492&e=c169cb0a8e)
If you can't join us to canvass in person this weekend, **please consider making a donation to power our movement campaign and to make sure our volunteers have the resources they need.**

---
| [Donate](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=bdefd86e38&e=c169cb0a8e "Donate")
---
| We're so grateful to stand alongside you in this fight because we know our power doesn't come from corporations or the rich, it comes from the organized working class. Thank you for all that you contribute to our movement.

In solidarity,
Team Heidi

name: Stephanie Schmid
subject: 39 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
We have 39 days until the end of the year. Can you chip in $39 to my campaign right now?
|
---

| | **Friends \-- [Will you donate $39 to help me get elected in 2020?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08f/522d4087/7afcdecb/4f341a98/711116430/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191122_em_link&amount=39")** | **[CONTRIBUTE $39 NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08f/522d4087/7afcdecb/4f341a97/711116430/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191122_em_button&amount=39")**
---
I want to tell you why **39** means so much to me right now as I reflect on our campaign.
**I turned 39 years old about a month before I announced I was running for Congress.**
Never in my wildest imagination did I think I would run for office.
After law school and private practice, I joined the United States Foreign Service as a political officer working around the world to promote free and fair elections, strengthen democratic institutions, including political parties and legislative bodies, and defend human rights and the rule of law. I swore an oath to protect and defend our Constitution and thought I would spend the rest of my life serving my country as a United States diplomat.
But after the November 2016 election, I was concerned about the strength of our own democratic institutions, including our electoral process, and I watched my beloved State Department and fellow Foreign Service Officers be attacked, dismissed, and undermined by this administration.
**Meanwhile, my opponent, Rep. Chris Smith, has been implementing harmful policies attacking our fundamental human rights over the past 39 years.**
What has he accomplished since he was elected in 1980? In a word: destruction.
He has championed the global gag rule, a draconian policy that blocks foreign non-governmental organizations, including healthcare providers who receive U.S. global health aid, from doing any work or advocacy related to abortion. Countless women have died due to unsafe abortions and thousands of their children have been orphaned because of this dangerous rule which gags healthcare professionals by preventing them from providing counseling and life-saving referrals to their patients. He has also voted against the Equality Act, the Violence Against Women Act, and worked to overturn _Roe_.
**Our next end of quarter deadline is in just 39 days.**
If we are going to beat Chris Smith, we need to kick our fundraising into full gear. We were only in the race for one month before our first end of quarter fundraising deadline and came _so close_ to out-fundraising our opponent. **I know if we all work together for the next 39 days, we can outraise Chris Smith in our first full quarter as a campaign.**
**So, ****friend****, can I count on you to chip in $39 to our campaign?**
Your donation will go directly to bringing new, fresh leadership to this district for the first time in 39 years.
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[CONTRIBUTE $25 NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08f/522d4087/7afcdecb/4f341a96/711116430/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20191122_em_abx_25")**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $39 NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08f/522d4087/7afcdecb/4f341a95/711116430/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=39&refcode=20191122_em_abx_39")**
---

clean_body: We have 39 days until the end of the year. Can you chip in $39 to my campaign right now? | | | Friends \-- "" | "" I want to tell you why 39 means so much to me right now as I reflect on our campaign. I turned 39 years old about a month before I announced I was running for Congress. Never in my wildest imagination did I think I would run for office. After law school and private practice, I joined the United States Foreign Service as a political officer working around the world to promote free and fair elections, strengthen democratic institutions, including political parties and legislative bodies, and defend human rights and the rule of law. I swore an oath to protect and defend our Constitution and thought I would spend the rest of my life serving my country as a United States diplomat. But after the November 2016 election, I was concerned about the strength of our own democratic institutions, including our electoral process, and I watched my beloved State Department and fellow Foreign Service Officers be attacked, dismissed, and undermined by this administration. Meanwhile, my opponent, Rep. Chris Smith, has been implementing harmful policies attacking our fundamental human rights over the past 39 years. What has he accomplished since he was elected in 1980? In a word: destruction. He has championed the global gag rule, a draconian policy that blocks foreign non-governmental organizations, including healthcare providers who receive U.S. global health aid, from doing any work or advocacy related to abortion. Countless women have died due to unsafe abortions and thousands of their children have been orphaned because of this dangerous rule which gags healthcare professionals by preventing them from providing counseling and life-saving referrals to their patients. He has also voted against the Equality Act, the Violence Against Women Act, and worked to overturn Roe. Our next end of quarter deadline is in just 39 days. If we are going to beat Chris Smith, we need to kick our fundraising into full gear. We were only in the race for one month before our first end of quarter fundraising deadline and came so close to out-fundraising our opponent. I know if we all work together for the next 39 days, we can outraise Chris Smith in our first full quarter as a campaign. So, friend, can I count on you to chip in $39 to our campaign? Your donation will go directly to bringing new, fresh leadership to this district for the first time in 39 years. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thank you, Stephanie | | | Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey. Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=emfooter&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5 Stephanie for New Jersey P.O. Box 217 Little Silver, NJ 07739 Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to "" at any time.

Friends: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports the ONLY way Democrats flip the Senate is by winning in Michigan.

**And after a right-wing super PAC just launched attack ads against Gary Peters in Michigan, polls are showing this race TIED. **Now Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are funneling millions into Michigan to buy this seat and tighten their grip on the Senate.
Earlier this week, a group of dedicated donors made an incredibly generous offer to match every contribution, up to our $40,000 goal, so we can protect Michigan's Democratic Senate seat.

**But right now, we're still falling $7,829 short of our goal to protect this important seat.** And in a race this close - with Senate control on the line - falling short just isn't an option.
**That's why for the very first time - and maybe last time - in our campaign, these committed donors are upping the ante: Every donation will be **__TRIPLE MATCHED__**, but ONLY until midnight!**

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d0/3eb3e2fc/57eba499/744d40de/1329640564/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191122_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191122_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). name: Warren 2020
subject: A short note about why your support is incredibly important right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
2020 is just around the corner, and right now is the time when this team is making budget decisions and preparing for the Iowa caucuses and voting in early states. This is the time when we need... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528b1a/45c30650/118c879e6/66f631f0/2578945280/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Your support makes this campaign possible -- and in the next couple of months, the pace is only going to get faster. But when we checked our fundraising numbers this morning, we saw that we still need 385 grassroots donations from Pennsylvania today to stay on track of our November fundraising goal.

2020 is just around the corner, and right now is the time when this team is making budget decisions and preparing for the Iowa caucuses and voting in early states.

This is the time when we need your support the most. We're building a grassroots movement that is going to win this election and make big, structural change, and we can't afford to lose steam now.

**That's why we need your support _right now_ to get back on track before the end of the month.**

This is the time when we need... | | | "" Your support makes this campaign possible -- and in the next couple of months, the pace is only going to get faster. But when we checked our fundraising numbers this morning, we saw that we still need 385 grassroots donations from Pennsylvania today to stay on track of our November fundraising goal. 2020 is just around the corner, and right now is the time when this team is making budget decisions and preparing for the Iowa caucuses and voting in early states. This is the time when we need your support the most. We're building a grassroots movement that is going to win this election and make big, structural change, and we can't afford to lose steam now. That's why we need your support right now to get back on track before the end of the month. name: SaraGideon.com
subject: [Washington Post] Sheldon Adelson and Republican mega donors are paying Collins back for her vote on Kavanaugh with giant campaign checks.
body:
We can't fall behind.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f49/4bef7a87/6bd3302e/287ff168/237974214/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Team --
A new article in the _Washington Post_ shines a light on what happened immediately after Susan Collins cast her deciding vote for Brett Kavanaugh:
**" Colleagues gathered around Collins after she cast her vote. 'Well, they're going to come after me with everything they can get,' she said. 'You don't worry,' Lindsey O. Graham of South Carolina replied. 'We've got Sheldon Adelson as chairman of your campaign finance committee, he said, referring to the Las Vegas casino billionaire who was the GOP's most generous donor."**
\- _Washington Post_ , 11/22/19
Big money Republican donors are paying Collins back for her vote with giant campaign checks. It's everything people hate about politics. And it's why we are funding our campaign differently -- powered by lots of people giving modest donations. But that means we have to ask:
**[Make a $3 contribution as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of Susan Collins' big-dollar, favor-returning fundraising ->](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f49/4bef7a87/6bd3302e/287ff16f/237974214/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMjItMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-nov-imgtst?refcode=em191122-2-b")**
All our best,
\- Team Sara
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f49/4bef7a87/6bd3302e/287ff16f/237974214/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMjItMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-nov-imgtst?refcode=em191122-2-b")******

Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

The good news is, I have this team in my corner. [**Here 's how your support will help win this campaign:**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909ae/7f51f7bc/4bf64e84/4ef09b98/2384109247/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1OCIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191122nd.2__558__&amount=10&recurring=true")

* Running online ads to spread our vision of a Texas that works for all of us

* Hiring staff and organizing the grassroots team we need to beat Senator Cornyn

I answer to Texans, not the special interests -- that's why I'm not taking any money from corporate PACs. So I am counting on this grassroots team to help meet every goal. **Texas will be the largest battleground state in the country, and we need to be prepared to run the kind of campaign it will take to win it.**
[**Our November deadline is just around the corner, and folks will be tuning out soon for Thanksgiving. WIll you pitch in now to help us stay on track to hit this critical goal?**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909ae/7f51f7bc/4bf64e84/4ef09b98/2384109247/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1OCIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191122nd.2__558__&amount=10&recurring=true")
Thanks, Peter.
\-- MJ
