name: Dr. Lerah Lee
subject: The "N" Word
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress
body:
ALERT: if you're sensitive to foul language, don't open this emailALERT: if you're sensitive to foul language, don't open this email. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_s=58cafe8edf494e66b6e4c06f5f65fd18&_t=_aAoKW_FRC1-zZtwwK-59WktFDRi-dvMNJHJbealySFpGPizvI22eqhocqvFoof2ot3z1tPiuCaY25c1HqsiBz_ilh1PKvXpaiq3mwmX9eewaDRk3f8iabaPSPT1ol5YMVvrlJ4cXf0LUb9Zpbikd4Z_cJ4VsPwl0U4JN_GhMnU%3D) | [](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=58cafe8edf494e66b6e4c06f5f65fd18&_e=bmNWkJTb_hF_epvG4Ne73kEF5EkqdvmHEXHTgxfSJzTZ_EMNhdK6O-WbiLags8mgJlhAtmE_gyEW0vF105aRPdoElm0QegZEQEOdjrjaBdmg0-U-lNtpxGM1y5vM6N7rEG2WZDYka6kplxf_dEBTkup25HXEjYpIub9b5StYS93-Sp7Nqk-gUpiQUhVLfxO_kgK5V4uQYGXvzrtSVr70RZ7wG6Ky6GeJJckCP6X7R5c18xlDvcmdnE3oz8WScc7vs7GMkAHsL99eRO-NjXU2J4rrDzOWtmGOVEFJwZPs6hBy2VHSDlpamWT4htt_GDmD)
---
Friend,

I knew that when I signed up to run for Congress it wouldn’t be easy. Running for public office requires for one to put it all on the line.

**For the past 25 years,** **I’ve spent my time raising five children and educating the children of my fellow Americans**. I have __no dirty laundry_ _of which to speak – however, it does take some getting used to seeing your name in the newspaper, your face on a website, or in digital ads.

But the most**challenging part of running for Congress** as a conservative Republican woman is the names, **the insults and the racial slurs** the trolls on the internet have lobbed my way, seemingly only for one of two reasons:
1. Because**I’m a female Republican of color** with views of my own – which often diverge with others in the Black community.
2. **Because racism is alive and well in the United States**.

| [**Stand Against Racism
Donate Today»**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=58cafe8edf494e66b6e4c06f5f65fd18&_e=bmNWkJTb_hF_epvG4Ne73kEF5EkqdvmHEXHTgxfSJzTZ_EMNhdK6O-WbiLags8mgJlhAtmE_gyEW0vF105aRPW4JDKiRNuvmKlhoocx-sAVgGaeH3uYUA5O-2O7VLIEWSbjJuROiWH9KkpJA07DYnxcBTB05RiXZvglblX7FLCHwjf30t1uCnr_Uto6W3QX9JV6tiakCKXikfyqVx5W7ulPVrw4DRxwnuxeunWBf51N9j2Et_qtq8TUssJNqvsdRThCx70fM75vIDx0Gje7ZvpNsJVuvpZWJnHtKMbLmuKtdSarOY4db8uefZRGP5_Eg)
---

Notice some of the more eloquent comments I’ve received in feedback from previous emails I’ve sent out to you and others around the country: ALERT: if you have an aversion to foul language – STOP reading now.

**Notable Comments:**
* “Truth is you’re just a “n****r”
* As far as reparations are concerned, the N*****S owe the white man reparations
* “You are screwed to believe Republicans will ever do any good for anyone but themselves”
* “Turn coat, Uncle Tom”
* “You’re a f******g uncle Thomasina dancing for the GOP”
* “F**k Off Racist “B***H”
* “Sellout”
* “I am for no black that is racist. And you sure are”

[**Stand Against Racism
Donate Today»**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=58cafe8edf494e66b6e4c06f5f65fd18&_e=bmNWkJTb_hF_epvG4Ne73kEF5EkqdvmHEXHTgxfSJzTZ_EMNhdK6O-WbiLags8mgJlhAtmE_gyEW0vF105aRPW4JDKiRNuvmKlhoocx-sAVuluE1ZfAQuMDXmNhYoS3FmQx319LezITXzEfLnKbA5oWEly8pH99yJhQ5JKeQeYYpgWoWVtGC-tKJRaKI1BlEANSEJ8Tt9AeDkvzcZFUzBauV8BbuozzVpKXppxRXA4T6Er1CukTUjxJJSjRhcnR0APFxVu3JZ8fPqF5mAiOnSAR_ZVM3_F9-J8srlRICzQcdJM5lt7e38odxPgg90zGp)
---

I have thick skin – these comments don’t bother me personally. What does bother me is that there are people out there that don’t seem to believe there is a place for a conservative like me in the Republican Party – or because of the color of my skin I’m expected to be a Democrat.

Some of the comments above are, indeed, from self-identified Democrats. Say what you want about President Trump, but ...
* **_Would a racist_** president stand for pro-life legislation when the majority of babies impacted by abortion are babies with disabilities and babies of color?

* **_Would a racist_** prioritize reducing prison sentences for non-violent crimes which disproportionately affect minority communities?

* **_Would a racist_** give the most money to historically black colleges and universities of any recent president?

As Republicans, **we should be _so proud_**.
[**Send a Black Conservative
To Congress »**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=58cafe8edf494e66b6e4c06f5f65fd18&_e=bmNWkJTb_hF_epvG4Ne73kEF5EkqdvmHEXHTgxfSJzTZ_EMNhdK6O-WbiLags8mgJlhAtmE_gyEW0vF105aRPW4JDKiRNuvmKlhoocx-sAWekBbwDiTn9OEzRxTe-alsbg4X7ciCq4XZjQ-Yr2eziV2IdnNxVVHgCWZPIM_fdyZLDMADsN3ig9SOQMQ1yN9JlcnjN-jZtT2S_kROWxghUdRY46KfJv2u6dHEYZOEZ0jhg-64rAOcTmYoLpNFxI1MgYMZjWvfyBnvobJPnCiB_oVNUEaVyctNd_Li95e0_bqfITMLiuske11FYX3ByORy)
---

Just like EVERY OTHER AMERICAN, I’m entitled to my own opinion and my choice of political party.

Like every other email requesting financial support for my campaign that I’ve sent out, I fully expect to receive negative feedback.

**What I won’t tolerate is being the target of racial slurs simply because of what I stand for**.

If you’re pro-life, pro-business, a supporter of limited government and want to keep your private health insurance – **[then I’m asking you to stand with me today so that I can go to Washington to fight for you!](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=58cafe8edf494e66b6e4c06f5f65fd18&_e=bmNWkJTb_hF_epvG4Ne73kEF5EkqdvmHEXHTgxfSJzTZ_EMNhdK6O-WbiLags8mgJlhAtmE_gyEW0vF105aRPdoElm0QegZEQEOdjrjaBdnRmgsVTTCJnVG-VXMfdITaiyawnEdSF3MDrIEZDW4eAYZAZ8kpmPffGw8s55NPBYUQHF6YuMbw1ZTTka5lQyn1Zl13c_7Bf3gvrg96fviOEL1nDWobFzg7SGxhClLzHtfC70vIeXWZxzIkNM94q3G6ezLT2iErTe7xWjdCFy7EwgNt0XqNyB-yG_RTfAowHmkOlHjm2TCzcRMFPnz3nsYg)**

I'm so grateful to you, Friend,

Blessings always,
[](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=58cafe8edf494e66b6e4c06f5f65fd18&_e=bmNWkJTb_hF_epvG4Ne73kEF5EkqdvmHEXHTgxfSJzTZ_EMNhdK6O-WbiLags8mgJlhAtmE_gyEW0vF105aRPdoElm0QegZEQEOdjrjaBdnyi4iUMoT8p8LEQqWteaZij_c3vm9NwQipAiu0Yr9QfU_1DvN5hNcQJQESluOwWjj4w2hMmTq13O4GSh8QtL2xtOTD_nkdlkhN5tiF6XIHEaDSFbpZmCjwvKaEX-_bDVtMDq9RN8G1wQvjO5bi4Wrk-qWHh7CnKZ_z0X5w8QnIfNhC3zpB-n29V6QNOXLJKF03vf2ukyoC1LlOQKr2C4Kr)
Dr. Lerah Lee

P.S: I’m on a mission to uplift ALL Americans, Friend, -- and **[I hope you’ll show your support by making a contribution to my campaign today.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=58cafe8edf494e66b6e4c06f5f65fd18&_e=bmNWkJTb_hF_epvG4Ne73kEF5EkqdvmHEXHTgxfSJzTZ_EMNhdK6O-WbiLags8mgJlhAtmE_gyEW0vF105aRPdoElm0QegZEQEOdjrjaBdlUGpJUDv5hMHbUU05hAOzDRyRp9KKpHUyywFh1w4mjbAO3oTkhqTL0EcTbFQqqRZQ8dvdp4_EBbMxg_XT3Nk-6StR1da-wlUmUUSKgAt5gUqAU0uqRUMqt3MJOkCNyuY3bd90adwgB_66p_sSqCLFst8OhIGZNVEiYvnXI7HU23hpo625Gsgdys3dB3WpjvVfRhXw9LrooZGlEdEP7hMVo)**
[**Send a Black Conservative

clean_body: ALERT: if you're sensitive to foul language, don't open this emailALERT: if you're sensitive to foul language, don't open this email. Don't want to receive our emails? | Friend, I knew that when I signed up to run for Congress it wouldn’t be easy. Running for public office requires for one to put it all on the line. For the past 25 years, I’ve spent my time raising five children and educating the children of my fellow Americans. I have no dirty laundry of which to speak – however, it does take some getting used to seeing your name in the newspaper, your face on a website, or in digital ads. But the mostchallenging part of running for Congress as a conservative Republican woman is the names, the insults and the racial slurs the trolls on the internet have lobbed my way, seemingly only for one of two reasons: 1. BecauseI’m a female Republican of color with views of my own – which often diverge with others in the Black community. 2. Because racism is alive and well in the United States. | Notice some of the more eloquent comments I’ve received in feedback from previous emails I’ve sent out to you and others around the country: ALERT: if you have an aversion to foul language – STOP reading now. Notable Comments: “Truth is you’re just a “nr” As far as reparations are concerned, the N***S owe the white man reparations “You are screwed to believe Republicans will ever do any good for anyone but themselves” “Turn coat, Uncle Tom” “You’re a f****g uncle Thomasina dancing for the GOP” “Fk Off Racist “BH” “Sellout” “I am for no black that is racist. And you sure are” I have thick skin – these comments don’t bother me personally. What does bother me is that there are people out there that don’t seem to believe there is a place for a conservative like me in the Republican Party – or because of the color of my skin I’m expected to be a Democrat. Some of the comments above are, indeed, from self-identified Democrats. Say what you want about President Trump, but ... Would a racist president stand for pro-life legislation when the majority of babies impacted by abortion are babies with disabilities and babies of color? Would a racist prioritize reducing prison sentences for non-violent crimes which disproportionately affect minority communities? Would a racist give the most money to historically black colleges and universities of any recent president? As Republicans, we should be so proud. Just like EVERY OTHER AMERICAN, I’m entitled to my own opinion and my choice of political party. Like every other email requesting financial support for my campaign that I’ve sent out, I fully expect to receive negative feedback. What I won’t tolerate is being the target of racial slurs simply because of what I stand for. If you’re pro-life, pro-business, a supporter of limited government and want to keep your private health insurance – I'm so grateful to you, Friend, Blessings always, Dr. Lerah Lee P.S: I’m on a mission to uplift ALL Americans, Friend, -- and | Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d1/3eb3e2fc/57f22b0c/744d43db/2954619224/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191122_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191122_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d1/3eb3e2fc/57f22b0c/744d43da/2954619224/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191122_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191122_em_fr_b3_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d1/3eb3e2fc/57f22b0c/744d43d9/2954619224/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191122_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191122_em_fr_b3_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump's attacks on immigrants are falling under the radar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The Trump administration has continued its campaign against immigrants unabated by the impeachment inquiry. Just recently, he promoted Chad Wolf, architect of the family separation policy, to be the top Homeland Security undersecretary, making him acting DHS chief. And that heinous policy is still in place, no matter how well the administration's tried to bury it and change it. And even though lower courts have ruled consistently against his illegal decision to end DACA and set up DREAMers for deportation, the president took his appeal to the Supreme Court this month. Trump's lawyers made it clear they intend to end the program and deport nearly a million people one way or another. This drastic step would devastate communities across the country and hurt those who are simply trying to live their lives in the only country they've known. They are our neighbors, friends, and family members. They are our teachers, co-workers, and strangers on the street worthy of safe and happy lives. We're asking voters what their thoughts are so we can understand where you stand on this critical issue: **Do you support DACA?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdccd/6e9863e8/16bd77ce/1db0a8dd/2572274531/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/bhyqhAG8") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdccd/6e9863e8/16bd77ce/1db0a8dd/2572274531/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/bhyqhAG8") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdccd/6e9863e8/16bd77ce/1db0a8dc/2572274531/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191122c.ND-b&refcode2=dJmJQiYxPP4cJpUKvPCj")

name: Mike Turner
subject: Nancy Pelosi is driving us towards danger!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDExNzgxODAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY0MjA2NDY3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Nancy Pelosi is driving us towards danger!

Peter,
[_**Jim Jordan and I need your help!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDExNzgxODAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjA2NDY3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0) We are in Congress fighting for the American people and asking the tough questions each day to keep Congress moving forward. Yet, Nancy Pelosi continues to steer Congress away from success and towards a dangerous cliff.
Now, because Jim and I have been vocal opponents against Nancy Pelosi, she is pouring in millions of dollars to defeat us in 2020. Jim and I are fighting for limited government and against corruption each day. [_**We need your help to fight back against these attacks!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDExNzgxODAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjA2NDY3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**[**Stand with Jim Jordan and myself!
Rush in $45 dollars now-> **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDExNzgxODAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjA2NDY3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Nancy Pelosi is leading Congress towards policies that will do irreparable harm to our country. She wants to pass a [_**$32 trillion dollar Medicare for All plan, provide amnesty to all illegal immigrants, and pass the Green New Deal**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=NDExNzgxODAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjA2NDY3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0). Not only are these dangerous ideas, but they will break the back of the American people. We simply cannot afford these policies.
Jim and I are fighting in Congress for affordable policies that will give all of us the freedom to live our lives. [_**Stand and fight with us!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDExNzgxODAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjA2NDY3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0) We will not be silenced while Nancy Pelosi and her band of coastal elites raise unprecedented amounts of money against us.
[_**Will you stand with Jim and me against Nancy Pelosi? **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=32&ms=NDExNzgxODAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjA2NDY3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_**[YES! I'll rush in $15 dollars now to help fight against Nancy Pelosi!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=NDExNzgxODAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjA2NDY3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[YES! I'll rush in $45 dollars now to help fight against Nancy Pelosi!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDExNzgxODAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjA2NDY3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[YES! I'll rush in $65 dollars now to help fight against Nancy Pelosi!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDExNzgxODAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjA2NDY3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[YES! I'll rush in $100 dollars now to help fight against Nancy Pelosi!>>> ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDExNzgxODAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjA2NDY3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**_
This is a critical point in our country's history. We cannot allow Nancy Pelosi, coastal elites, and Washington bureaucrats pour millions in to silence Jim and me. We will not sit by while their dangerous policies make their way through Congress.
Thank you,

Mike Turner
**[**DONATE**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=NDExNzgxODAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjA2NDY3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five stories President Trump doesn’t want you to miss
body:
Schiff’s Impeachment Hearings Wasting Time When Congress Must Do Real Work | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=54afab2972&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Schiff’s Impeachment Hearings Wasting Time When Congress Must Do Real Work**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b5e984cf91&e=3ee4985eea)
_-New York Post_
“Rep. Adam Schiff’s House Intelligence Committee has now heard all its announced public hearing impeachment witnesses, yet all those hours of televised testimony plainly failed on their announced goal: to change Americans’ minds,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. Now, with all that time wasted, “Speaker Nancy Pelosi just said she doubts Congress has the time to pass the [USMCA] trade deal this year.”

[Here’s a rundown of what Schiff’s “fact” witnesses had to say.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aea544e6b1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**How Republicans Won Phase One of Impeachment**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4877cd7f44&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Federalist_
“The first phase of impeachment did not go well for Democrats. It needed to be a time when support for the inquiry and impeachment grew. Instead, it shrank,” Mollie Hemingway writes. “To begin with, not only was the vote to begin proceedings not bipartisan, there was bipartisan opposition to it.” Moreover, “Emerson polling showed that support for impeachment flipped since October,” with more Americans now opposed.

**Same Swamp:** [Ratings fall flat as most Americans tune out impeachment spectacle](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a4b7e625c1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Why Dems Are So Worried After Latest Round of Impeachment Hearings**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=863b79f269&e=3ee4985eea)
_-New York Post_
“The clock is ticking on Democrats’ chance to make their case. Pelosi is clearly worried, telling fellow Dems it’s a ‘weak response’ to ‘let the election decide’ whether President Trump should be removed,” Michael Goodwin writes. Her letter seemed strange when it became public Monday, but this week’s hearings have “more than justified her fear and desperation.”
---
|
---
| [**Apple CEO Tim Cook and President Trump Toured a Texas Computer Factory to Tout US Manufacturing**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2379123f75&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNBC
President Trump has made fixing American trade deals a priority since day one, and a recent visit to a Texas factory offered the perfect opportunity to show Americans the results of those efforts. “I would always talk about Apple, that I want to see Apple building plants in the United States, and that’s what’s happening,” the President said.

**🎬** [**Watch President Trump****tour****an Apple factory in Texas!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=33cbc2e1d6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Confidence in Trump Economy at Record High, With No Hit From Impeachment**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6db8582c1c&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“Another poll finds that public support for President Trump has not waned in the face of House impeachment hearings, and the approval for his handling of the economy has hit a new record high,” Paul Bedard reports. A new Gallup survey shows that 57 percent approve of the Trump Economy—the best number so far. “It comes as the stock market is hitting new highs, and unemployment is at a low for several groups.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cef4da9e5c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=615dfd71e8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=11162783fd)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---
